    customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH RankedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) AS revenue_rank
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        r.r_name = 'ASIA' 
        AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' 
        AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name
),
TopSellingParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p_partkey, 
        p_name,
        total_revenue
    FROM 
        RankedSales
    WHERE 
        revenue_rank <= 10
)
SELECT 
    tsp.p_partkey,
    tsp.p_name,
    tsp.total_revenue,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    s.s_acctbal AS supplier_account_balance,
    n.n_name AS nation_name
FROM 
    TopSellingParts tsp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON tsp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY 
    tsp.total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.p_partkey,
    sub.p_name,
    sub.total_revenue,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    s.s_acctbal AS supplier_account_balance,
    n.n_name AS nation_name
FROM (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        part p
    JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE
        r.r_name = 'ASIA'
        AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name
    HAVING
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) DESC) <= 10
) sub
JOIN partsupp ps ON sub.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY
    sub.total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
WITH SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_nationkey, 
        s.s_acctbal, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyValue
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        c.c_nationkey, 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS OrderCount,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS TotalSpent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_nationkey
),
NationRegions AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey,
        n.n_name,
        r.r_regionkey,
        r.r_name 
    FROM nation n
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
SupplierRegionDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.s_suppkey,
        sd.s_name,
        nr.n_name AS NationName,
        nr.r_name AS RegionName,
        sd.TotalSupplyValue
    FROM SupplierDetails sd
    JOIN NationRegions nr ON sd.s_nationkey = nr.n_nationkey
)
SELECT 
    sr.NationName,
    sr.RegionName,
    COUNT(DISTINCT co.c_custkey) AS UniqueCustomers,
    AVG(co.TotalSpent) AS AvgCustomerSpent,
    SUM(sr.TotalSupplyValue) AS TotalSupplyValueForRegion
FROM SupplierRegionDetails sr
JOIN CustomerOrders co ON sr.s_suppkey IN (SELECT ps.ps_suppkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_partkey IN (SELECT l.l_partkey FROM lineitem l JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F'))
GROUP BY sr.NationName, sr.RegionName
ORDER BY TotalSupplyValueForRegion DESC, UniqueCustomers DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS NationName,
    r.r_name AS RegionName,
    COUNT(DISTINCT co.c_custkey) AS UniqueCustomers,
    AVG(co.TotalSpent) AS AvgCustomerSpent,
    SUM(sd.TotalSupplyValue) AS TotalSupplyValueForRegion
FROM (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_nationkey, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyValue
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal
) sd
JOIN nation n ON sd.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        c.c_nationkey, 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS OrderCount,
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS TotalSpent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_nationkey
) co
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps2
    WHERE ps2.ps_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM lineitem l
          JOIN orders o2 ON l.l_orderkey = o2.o_orderkey
          WHERE o2.o_orderstatus = 'F'
            AND l.l_partkey = ps2.ps_partkey
      )
)
GROUP BY n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY TotalSupplyValueForRegion DESC, UniqueCustomers DESC;

sql1:
WITH TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_value
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ORDER BY total_value DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
RecentOrders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
),
OrderLineItems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount, l.l_tax, l.l_shipdate
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN RecentOrders ro ON l.l_orderkey = ro.o_orderkey
),
CustomerDetails AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_nationkey
    FROM customer c
    JOIN RecentOrders ro ON c.c_custkey = ro.o_custkey
),
TopRegions AS (
    SELECT r.r_regionkey, r.r_name, COUNT(DISTINCT n.n_nationkey) AS nation_count
    FROM region r
    JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    GROUP BY r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
    ORDER BY nation_count DESC
    LIMIT 5
)
SELECT 
    cs.c_name AS customer_name,
    ts.s_name AS supplier_name,
    SUM(oli.l_extendedprice * (1 - oli.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oli.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM OrderLineItems oli
JOIN TopSuppliers ts ON oli.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = ts.s_suppkey)
JOIN CustomerDetails cs ON oli.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o WHERE o.o_custkey = cs.c_custkey)
JOIN TopRegions r ON cs.c_nationkey IN (SELECT n.n_nationkey FROM nation n WHERE n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey)
GROUP BY cs.c_name, ts.s_name, r.r_name
HAVING SUM(oli.l_extendedprice * (1 - oli.l_discount)) > 50000
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    AND o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN (
    SELECT r2.r_regionkey, r2.r_name
    FROM region r2
    JOIN nation n2 ON r2.r_regionkey = n2.n_regionkey
    GROUP BY r2.r_regionkey, r2.r_name
    ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT n2.n_nationkey) DESC
    LIMIT 5
) r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN (
    SELECT s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name
    FROM supplier s2
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s2.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name
    ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC
    LIMIT 10
) s ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM orders o2
    WHERE o2.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
      AND o2.o_custkey = s.s_suppkey
)
GROUP BY c.c_name, s.s_name, r.r_name
HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 50000
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

sql1:
WITH SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
),
NationDetails AS (
    SELECT n.n_nationkey, n.n_name, r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM nation n
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT sd.s_suppkey, sd.s_name, nd.n_name, sd.total_cost,
           RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY nd.n_name ORDER BY sd.total_cost DESC) AS cost_rank
    FROM SupplierDetails sd
    JOIN NationDetails nd ON sd.s_nationkey = nd.n_nationkey
)
SELECT rs.n_name AS nation_name, rs.s_name AS supplier_name, rs.total_cost
FROM RankedSuppliers rs
WHERE rs.cost_rank <= 5
ORDER BY rs.n_name, rs.total_cost DESC;
sql2:
SELECT n.n_name AS nation_name,
       s.s_name AS supplier_name,
       SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM supplier s
JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
GROUP BY n.n_name, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
HAVING (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM (
        SELECT s2.s_suppkey,
               SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS tc
        FROM supplier s2
        JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
        WHERE s2.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey
    ) t
    WHERE t.tc > SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty)
) < 5
ORDER BY n.n_name, total_cost DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_orderpriority,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS OrderRank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
        AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
SupplierParts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        ps.ps_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > 0
),
HighValueOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        r.o_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalValue
    FROM 
        RankedOrders r
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON r.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        r.OrderRank <= 10
    GROUP BY 
        r.o_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    sp.s_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT hvo.o_orderkey) AS OrderCount,
    SUM(sp.ps_supplycost * sp.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyCost,
    AVG(hvo.TotalValue) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM 
    SupplierParts sp
JOIN 
    HighValueOrders hvo ON sp.ps_partkey IN (
        SELECT 
            ps.ps_partkey 
        FROM 
            partsupp ps 
        GROUP BY 
            ps.ps_partkey 
        HAVING 
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 1000
    )
GROUP BY 
    sp.s_name
ORDER BY 
    OrderCount DESC, 
    TotalSupplyCost DESC
LIMIT 5;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sp.s_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT hvo.o_orderkey) AS OrderCount,
    SUM(sp.ps_supplycost * sp.ps_availqty) AS TotalSupplyCost,
    AVG(hvo.TotalValue) AS AvgOrderValue
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_name,
            ps.ps_partkey,
            ps.ps_availqty,
            ps.ps_supplycost
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        WHERE 
            s.s_acctbal > 0
    ) sp
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT ps.ps_partkey
        FROM partsupp ps
        GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
        HAVING SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 1000
    ) hp ON sp.ps_partkey = hp.ps_partkey
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            sub.o_orderkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS TotalValue
        FROM 
            (
                SELECT 
                    o.o_orderkey,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS OrderRank
                FROM 
                    orders o
                WHERE 
                    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
                    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
            ) sub
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON sub.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE 
            sub.OrderRank <= 10
        GROUP BY 
            sub.o_orderkey
    ) hvo
GROUP BY 
    sp.s_name
ORDER BY 
    OrderCount DESC, 
    TotalSupplyCost DESC
LIMIT 5;

sql1:
WITH RegionalSales AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
        AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name
),
RankedSales AS (
    SELECT 
        region_name,
        total_sales,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        RegionalSales
)
SELECT 
    region_name,
    total_sales,
    sales_rank
FROM 
    RankedSales
WHERE 
    sales_rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
;
sql2:
SELECT
    region_name,
    total_sales,
    sales_rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        rs.region_name,
        rs.total_sales,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rs.total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM (
        SELECT
            r.r_name AS region_name,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
        FROM
            lineitem l
        JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
        JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
            AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
        GROUP BY
            r.r_name
    ) rs
) ranked
WHERE sales_rank <= 5
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;

sql1:
WITH SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
), 
CustomerPurchases AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name
), 
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.*, 
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_supply_value DESC) AS supplier_rank 
    FROM 
        SupplierStats s
), 
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.*, 
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_spent DESC) AS customer_rank 
    FROM 
        CustomerPurchases c
)

SELECT 
    tc.c_name AS top_customer, 
    ts.s_name AS top_supplier, 
    tc.total_spent, 
    ts.total_supply_value 
FROM 
    TopCustomers tc
JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON tc.total_orders > 5 AND ts.supplier_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    tc.total_spent DESC, ts.total_supply_value DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
SELECT
    tc.c_name AS top_customer,
    ts.s_name AS top_supplier,
    tc.total_spent,
    ts.total_supply_value
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            c.c_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_spent
        FROM
            customer c
        JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
        GROUP BY
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name
        HAVING
            COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
    ) tc
CROSS JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
        ORDER BY
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC
    ) ts
WHERE
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ts.total_supply_value DESC) <= 10
ORDER BY
    tc.total_spent DESC, ts.total_supply_value DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
    AND r.r_name = 'Europe'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH european_nations AS (
    SELECT n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    FROM nation n
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM region r
        WHERE r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey AND r.r_name = 'Europe'
    )
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_suppkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
)
SELECT
    en.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(fl.revenue) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
FROM
    filtered_lineitems fl
JOIN supplier s ON fl.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN european_nations en ON s.s_nationkey = en.n_nationkey
JOIN orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
GROUP BY
    en.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        c.c_name, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS distinct_parts
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, c.c_name
), OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        o_orderkey, 
        o_orderdate, 
        c_name, 
        total_sales,
        distinct_parts,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o_orderdate ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM 
        RankedOrders
)

SELECT 
    os.o_orderkey,
    os.o_orderdate,
    os.c_name,
    os.total_sales,
    os.distinct_parts
FROM 
    OrderSummary os
WHERE 
    os.sales_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    os.o_orderdate, os.total_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sub.o_orderkey,
    sub.o_orderdate,
    sub.c_name,
    sub.total_sales,
    sub.distinct_parts
FROM (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        c.c_name, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS distinct_parts
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate <= '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, c.c_name
) sub
WHERE (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            o2.o_orderkey,
            SUM(l2.l_extendedprice * (1 - l2.l_discount)) AS total_sales2
        FROM 
            orders o2
        JOIN 
            lineitem l2 ON o2.o_orderkey = l2.l_orderkey
        WHERE 
            o2.o_orderdate = sub.o_orderdate
        GROUP BY 
            o2.o_orderkey
    ) rival
    WHERE rival.total_sales2 > sub.total_sales
       OR (rival.total_sales2 = sub.total_sales AND rival.o_orderkey <= sub.o_orderkey)
) < 10
ORDER BY 
    sub.o_orderdate, sub.total_sales DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, r.r_name AS region_name,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_name ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, s.region_name
    FROM RankedSuppliers s
    WHERE s.rank <= 5
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT o.o_custkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY o.o_custkey
),
CustomerSales AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_acctbal, os.total_sales
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN OrderSummary os ON c.c_custkey = os.o_custkey
    WHERE c.c_acctbal > 0
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT cs.c_custkey, cs.c_name, cs.total_sales,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY cs.total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM CustomerSales cs
)
SELECT ts.c_custkey, ts.c_name, ts.total_sales, ts.sales_rank, tps.s_suppkey, tps.s_name
FROM TopCustomers ts
JOIN TopSuppliers tps ON ts.total_sales > 10000
ORDER BY ts.sales_rank, ts.total_sales DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    tc.c_custkey,
    tc.c_name,
    tc.total_sales,
    tc.sales_rank,
    ts.s_suppkey,
    ts.s_name
FROM (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, os.total_sales,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY os.total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM customer c
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT o.o_custkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
        FROM lineitem l
        JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY o.o_custkey
    ) os ON c.c_custkey = os.o_custkey
    WHERE c.c_acctbal > 0
) tc
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_name ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) <= 5
) ts
WHERE tc.total_sales > 10000
ORDER BY tc.sales_rank, tc.total_sales DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        n.n_name AS nation_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_name ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        nation_name,
        s_suppkey,
        s_name,
        total_cost
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers
    WHERE 
        supplier_rank <= 5
),
HighValueOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_value
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice
    HAVING 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 1000
)
SELECT 
    ts.nation_name, 
    ts.s_name, 
    hvo.o_orderkey, 
    hvo.order_value
FROM 
    TopSuppliers ts
JOIN 
    HighValueOrders hvo ON ts.total_cost > hvo.o_totalprice
ORDER BY 
    ts.nation_name, 
    ts.total_cost DESC, 
    hvo.order_value DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
SELECT
    ts.nation_name,
    ts.s_name,
    hvo.o_orderkey,
    hvo.order_value
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            n.n_name AS nation_name,
            SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name
        HAVING
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                FROM (
                    SELECT
                        s2.s_suppkey,
                        n2.n_name AS nn,
                        SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS tc
                    FROM supplier s2
                    JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
                    JOIN nation n2 ON s2.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
                    GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey, n2.n_name
                ) r
                WHERE r.nn = n.n_name
                  AND r.tc > SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty)
            ) < 5
    ) ts
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS order_value
        FROM
            orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        WHERE
            o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
        GROUP BY
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_totalprice
        HAVING
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 1000
    ) hvo ON ts.total_cost > hvo.o_totalprice
ORDER BY
    ts.nation_name,
    ts.total_cost DESC,
    hvo.order_value DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name, 
        SUM(rs.total_supply_cost) AS region_total_cost
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers rs
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON rs.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        rs.supplier_rank <= 10
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name
)
SELECT 
    ts.region_name,
    AVG(ts.region_total_cost) AS average_supply_cost,
    COUNT(ts.region_total_cost) AS supplier_count
FROM 
    TopSuppliers ts
GROUP BY 
    ts.region_name
ORDER BY 
    average_supply_cost DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    region_totals.region_name,
    AVG(region_totals.region_total_cost) AS average_supply_cost,
    COUNT(region_totals.region_total_cost) AS supplier_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(top10.total_supply_cost) AS region_total_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT sc.s_suppkey, sc.total_supply_cost
        FROM (
            SELECT s.s_suppkey, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
            FROM supplier s
            JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY s.s_suppkey
        ) sc
        WHERE (
            SELECT COUNT(*)
            FROM (
                SELECT s2.s_suppkey, SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost * ps2.ps_availqty) AS tsc
                FROM supplier s2
                JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
                GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey
            ) sc2
            WHERE sc2.tsc > sc.total_supply_cost
        ) < 10
    ) top10
    JOIN supplier s3 ON top10.s_suppkey = s3.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s3.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY r.r_name
) region_totals
GROUP BY region_totals.region_name
ORDER BY average_supply_cost DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_orderpriority,
        c.c_name,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
),
TopSupps AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_size > 10
    GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_suppkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        ts.total_supply_value,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ts.total_supply_value DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        TopSupps ts ON s.s_suppkey = ts.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT 
    ro.o_orderkey,
    ro.c_name,
    ro.o_orderdate,
    ro.o_orderstatus,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    ts.s_name AS top_supplier,
    ts.total_supply_value
FROM 
    RankedOrders ro
JOIN 
    lineitem li ON ro.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    TopSuppliers ts ON li.l_suppkey = ts.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    ro.price_rank <= 5 AND ts.rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    ro.o_orderdate DESC, ro.o_orderkey;
sql2:
SELECT 
    ro.o_orderkey,
    ro.c_name,
    ro.o_orderdate,
    ro.o_orderstatus,
    ro.o_totalprice,
    ts.s_name AS top_supplier,
    ts.total_supply_value
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            o.o_totalprice,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_orderpriority,
            c.c_name,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS price_rank
        FROM 
            orders o
        JOIN 
            customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
    ) ro
JOIN 
    lineitem li ON ro.o_orderkey = li.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            ts_inner.total_supply_value,
            RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ts_inner.total_supply_value DESC) AS rank
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    ps.ps_suppkey,
                    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_value
                FROM 
                    partsupp ps
                WHERE 
                    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND p.p_size > 10)
                GROUP BY 
                    ps.ps_suppkey
            ) ts_inner ON s.s_suppkey = ts_inner.ps_suppkey
    ) ts ON li.l_suppkey = ts.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    ro.price_rank <= 5 AND ts.rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    ro.o_orderdate DESC, ro.o_orderkey;

sql1:
WITH RegionalPerformance AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) AS total_freight_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_fulfilled_orders,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE 
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_name
),
AggregateMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(total_freight_revenue) AS avg_revenue_per_region,
        SUM(total_fulfilled_orders) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(DISTINCT region_name) AS distinct_regions
    FROM 
        RegionalPerformance
)
SELECT 
    rp.region_name,
    rp.total_freight_revenue,
    rp.total_fulfilled_orders,
    rp.avg_order_value,
    am.avg_revenue_per_region,
    am.total_orders,
    am.distinct_regions
FROM 
    RegionalPerformance rp,
    AggregateMetrics am
ORDER BY 
    rp.total_freight_revenue DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    region_name,
    total_freight_revenue,
    total_fulfilled_orders,
    avg_order_value,
    AVG(total_freight_revenue) OVER () AS avg_revenue_per_region,
    SUM(total_fulfilled_orders) OVER () AS total_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT region_name) OVER () AS distinct_regions
FROM (
    SELECT
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) ELSE 0 END) AS total_freight_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_fulfilled_orders,
        AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_value
    FROM
        region r
    INNER JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY
        r.r_name
) rp
ORDER BY
    total_freight_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(pa.total_cost) AS total_cost
FROM
    ps_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = pa.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps_partkey,
        ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM
        partsupp
    GROUP BY
        ps_partkey, ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    pa.total_cost
FROM
    ps_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = pa.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY

LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_lineitem_partsupp AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        part p ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        n.n_name
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
)
SELECT
    sn.n_name,
    SUM(plp.l_extendedprice * (1 - plp.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part_lineitem_partsupp plp
JOIN
    supplier_nation sn ON sn.s_suppkey = plp.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY
    sn.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    ps.ps_supplycost,
    s.s_name,
    s.s_acctbal,
    o.o_orderkey,
    o.o_totalprice,
    c.c_name,
    c.c_mktsegment
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE
    p.p_retailprice > 100.00
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
ORDER BY
    o.o_orderkey ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_retailprice > 100.00
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, o_totalprice
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
)
SELECT
    fp.p_partkey,
    fp.p_name,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    ps.ps_supplycost,
    s.s_name,
    s.s_acctbal,
    fo.o_orderkey,
    fo.o_totalprice,
    c.c_name,
    c.c_mktsegment
FROM
    filtered_parts fp
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON fp.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
ORDER BY
    fo.o_orderkey ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey 
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'REGION_NAME' 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH regional_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'REGION_NAME'
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    regional_suppliers rs ON ps.ps_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asian_ps AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
          AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    )
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
)
SELECT
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN
    asian_ps ap ON p.p_partkey = ap.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:

    l_orderkey,

WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' 
    AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01' + INTERVAL '1 year' 
GROUP BY

sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT
        l_orderkey,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
)
SELECT
    l_orderkey,
    SUM(line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM
    filtered
GROUP BY
    l_orderkey
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asia_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    asia_partsupp ap ON p.p_partkey = ap.ps_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey 
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA' 
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' 
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01' 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asian_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
),
part_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        ap.ps_partkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN asian_partsupp ap ON l.l_partkey = ap.ps_partkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(pr.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN part_revenue pr ON p.p_partkey = pr.l_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_container,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand, p.p_container
ORDER BY 
    total_availqty DESC, total_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH supplier_region AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    INNER JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_container,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
FROM 
    partsupp ps
INNER JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN supplier_region sr ON sr.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand, p.p_container
ORDER BY 
    total_availqty DESC, total_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 100

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey 
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o
        WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
          AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ol.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN order_lines ol ON p.p_partkey = ol.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
),
customer_nation AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, n.n_name
    FROM customer c
    JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
)
SELECT 
    cn.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    filtered_lineitems fl
JOIN 
    orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer_nation cn ON o.o_custkey = cn.c_custkey
WHERE 
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_suppkey = fl.l_suppkey)
GROUP BY 
    cn.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue 
FROM 
    customer 
JOIN 
    orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey 
JOIN 
    supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey 
GROUP BY 
    n_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_detail AS (
    SELECT
        n.n_name,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l,
        orders o,
        customer c,
        supplier s,
        nation n
    WHERE
        l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        AND o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        AND l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n_name,
    SUM(line_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_detail
GROUP BY
    n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1993-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1994-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1993-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1994-01-01'
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name AS nation_name, r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM supplier s
    INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
line_revenue AS (
    SELECT l.l_suppkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo
        INNER JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
)
SELECT
    sn.nation_name,
    sn.region_name,
    SUM(lr.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    line_revenue lr
INNER JOIN supplier_nation sn ON lr.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    sn.nation_name, sn.region_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_mfgr,
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_mfgr,
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o)
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH supply_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supplycost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    sa.total_supplycost
FROM
    supply_agg sa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = sa.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue, 
    o_orderdate
FROM 
    lineitem 
JOIN 
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey 
WHERE 
    l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1994-01-01' AND DATE '1994-12-31' 
GROUP BY 
    o_orderdate 
ORDER BY 
    o_orderdate;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lines AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1994-01-01' AND DATE '1994-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    SUM(fl.line_revenue) AS revenue,
    o.o_orderdate
FROM 
    orders o
    INNER JOIN filtered_lines fl ON o.o_orderkey = fl.l_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    o.o_orderdate
ORDER BY 
    o.o_orderdate;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey 
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey 
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asian_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
),
asian_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey IN (SELECT s_suppkey FROM asian_suppliers)
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    asian_partsupp aps ON p.p_partkey = aps.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    n.n_name,
    r.r_name
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
),
supplier_region AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name, r.r_name
    FROM supplier s
    INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    sr.n_name,
    sr.r_name
FROM
    lineitem l
INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
INNER JOIN supplier_region sr ON l.l_suppkey = sr.s_suppkey
INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
WHERE
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey)
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, sr.n_name, sr.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA' 
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asia_part_supplier_cnt AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) * a.cnt AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    asia_part_supplier_cnt a ON p.p_partkey = a.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, a.cnt
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name,

    part p

    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey

JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_revenue AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    pr.total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    part_revenue pr ON p.p_partkey = pr.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    WHERE
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey)
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    a.total_supply_cost,
    a.supplier_count
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    ps_agg a ON p.p_partkey = a.ps_partkey
ORDER BY
    a.total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
),
supplier_count AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS num_suppliers
    FROM partsupp ps
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey)
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_quantity) * sc.num_suppliers AS total_quantity,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice) * sc.num_suppliers AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN supplier_count sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name, sc.num_suppliers
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH revenue_cte AS (
    SELECT 
        l_partkey AS p_partkey,
        SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        lineitem
    WHERE 
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    GROUP BY 
        l_partkey
    HAVING 
        l_partkey IN (SELECT p_partkey FROM part)
)
SELECT 
    p_partkey, 
    total_revenue
FROM 
    revenue_cte
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_orderkey
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(ol.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ol.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    order_lines ol ON p.p_partkey = ol.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH lq AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
),
psc AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, AVG(ps_supplycost) AS avg_cost, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    lq.sum_qty * psc.cnt AS total_quantity,
    psc.avg_cost AS avg_supply_cost
FROM part p
JOIN psc ON p.p_partkey = psc.ps_partkey
JOIN lq ON p.p_partkey = lq.l_partkey
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_extended_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH line_agg AS (
    SELECT
        l_partkey,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_extended_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_orderkey IN (SELECT o_orderkey FROM orders)
    GROUP BY
        l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    la.total_quantity,
    la.total_extended_price,
    la.total_orders
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    line_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    l_orderkey, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem
WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' 
    AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    l_orderkey
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lines AS (
    SELECT
        l_orderkey,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'

SELECT
    l_orderkey,

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    customer AS c
JOIN
    orders AS o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem AS l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier AS s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp AS ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem AS l
    JOIN
        orders AS o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN
        customer AS c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN
        partsupp AS ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND l.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        supplier AS s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    r.total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_cte AS r
JOIN
    nation AS n ON r.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY
    r.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'REGION_NAME'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH region_suppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'REGION_NAME'
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    region_suppliers rs ON p.p_partkey = rs.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    rv.total_revenue
FROM
    revenue rv
JOIN nation n ON rv.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    l_returnflag, 
    l_linestatus, 
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge, 
    AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty, 
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price, 
    AVG(l_discount) AS avg_discount, 
    COUNT(*) AS count_order 
FROM 
    lineitem 
WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' 
    AND l_shipdate < DATE '1994-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR 
GROUP BY 
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus 
ORDER BY 
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus;
sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT
        l_returnflag,
        l_linestatus,
        l_quantity,
        l_extendedprice,
        l_discount,
        l_tax
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
)
SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
    SUM(l_quantity) / COUNT(*) AS avg_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) / COUNT(*) AS avg_price,
    SUM(l_discount) / COUNT(*) AS avg_discount,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM
    filtered
GROUP BY
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n.n_name = 'USA' 
    AND o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH usa_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM nation n
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey AND n.n_name = 'USA'
    )
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01'
      AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey)
),
qualified_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_orderkey IN (SELECT fo.o_orderkey FROM filtered_orders fo)
      AND l.l_suppkey IN (SELECT us.s_suppkey FROM usa_suppliers us)
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(ql.l_extendedprice * (1 - ql.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN qualified_lineitems ql ON p.p_partkey = ql.l_partkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = ql.l_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
partsupp_lineitem AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
)
SELECT 
    sn.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(pl.l_extendedprice * (1 - pl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    supplier_nation sn
JOIN 
    partsupp_lineitem pl ON sn.s_suppkey = pl.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    sn.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    o_orderpriority
FROM
    orders o
JOIN
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY
    o_orderpriority
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH order_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l_orderkey,
        SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem
    GROUP BY
        l_orderkey
)
SELECT
    SUM(r.line_revenue) AS total_revenue,
    o.o_orderpriority
FROM
    orders o
JOIN
    order_revenue r ON o.o_orderkey = r.l_orderkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY
    o.o_orderpriority
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH lps AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS agg_quantity,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS agg_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(lps.agg_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(lps.agg_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lps
JOIN
    part p ON lps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON lps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH order_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        o.o_custkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(orv.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    order_revenue orv
JOIN
    customer c ON orv.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    ps.ps_availqty, 
    ps.ps_supplycost 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
WHERE 
    ps.ps_availqty > 0 
ORDER BY 
    ps.ps_supplycost DESC 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH available_parts AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey, ps_availqty, ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    WHERE ps_availqty > 0
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    ap.ps_availqty,
    ap.ps_supplycost
FROM
    available_parts ap,
    part p,
    supplier s
WHERE
    p.p_partkey = ap.ps_partkey
    AND s.s_suppkey = ap.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    ap.ps_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supp_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
supp_parts AS (
    SELECT sn.n_name, ps.ps_partkey, sn.s_suppkey
    FROM supp_nation sn
    JOIN partsupp ps ON sn.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
),
valid_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM orders o
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
)
SELECT
    sp.n_name AS nation_name,
    SUM(vl.l_extendedprice * (1 - vl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    supp_parts sp
JOIN
    part p ON sp.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    valid_lineitems vl ON p.p_partkey = vl.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    sp.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
          AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND l.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    asia_suppliers a ON l.l_suppkey = a.s_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    l.l_quantity,
    l.l_extendedprice,
    o.o_orderdate
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
ORDER BY
    l.l_extendedprice DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_orderdate
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
),
part_suppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, s.s_name
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    ps2.s_name,
    l.l_quantity,
    l.l_extendedprice,
    fo.o_orderdate
FROM
    lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    INNER JOIN part_suppliers ps2 ON p.p_partkey = ps2.ps_partkey
ORDER BY
    l.l_extendedprice DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    r.r_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
line_supp AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
),
supp_nation AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name, r.r_name AS r_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    sn.n_name,
    sn.r_name,
    SUM(ls.line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM
    line_supp ls
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON ls.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON ls.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND ls.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN supp_nation sn ON ls.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    sn.n_name, sn.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC;

    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

sql2:
WITH filtered_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           l.l_quantity,
           l.l_extendedprice,
           l.l_orderkey
    FROM   lineitem l
    WHERE  EXISTS (SELECT 1
                   FROM   orders o
                   WHERE  o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                     AND  o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31')
)
SELECT p.p_name,
       SUM(fl.l_quantity)                AS total_quantity,
       SUM(fl.l_extendedprice)           AS total_revenue,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fl.l_orderkey)     AS order_count
FROM   part p
JOIN   filtered_lines fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP  BY p.p_name
ORDER  BY total_revenue DESC
