sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM lineitem l
JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey

ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

sql2:
WITH ps_count AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
),
line_rev AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS part_revenue
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT p.p_name, SUM(lr.part_revenue * pc.cnt) AS total_revenue
FROM line_rev lr
JOIN ps_count pc ON lr.l_partkey = pc.ps_partkey
JOIN part p ON lr.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
    SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
    p.p_brand AS product_brand
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    L.l_orderkey,
    SUM(L.l_extendedprice * (1 - L.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    O.o_orderdate,
    C.c_name,
    S.s_name,
    P.p_name,
    N.n_name,
    R.r_name
FROM
    lineitem L
JOIN
    orders O ON L.l_orderkey = O.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer C ON O.o_custkey = C.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier S ON L.l_suppkey = S.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp PS ON L.l_partkey = PS.ps_partkey AND S.s_suppkey = PS.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part P ON PS.ps_partkey = P.p_partkey
JOIN
    nation N ON S.s_nationkey = N.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region R ON N.n_regionkey = R.r_regionkey
WHERE
    O.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND O.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY
    L.l_orderkey,
    O.o_orderdate,
    C.c_name,
    S.s_name,
    P.p_name,
    N.n_name,
    R.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, o_orderdate
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
),
supplier_info AS (
    SELECT S.s_suppkey, S.s_name, N.n_name, R.r_name, S.s_nationkey
    FROM supplier S
    JOIN nation N ON S.s_nationkey = N.n_nationkey
    JOIN region R ON N.n_regionkey = R.r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    L.l_orderkey,
    SUM(L.l_extendedprice * (1 - L.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    fo.o_orderdate,
    C.c_name,
    SI.s_name,
    P.p_name,
    SI.n_name,
    SI.r_name
FROM
    filtered_orders fo
JOIN
    customer C ON fo.o_custkey = C.c_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem L ON L.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier_info SI ON L.l_suppkey = SI.s_suppkey
JOIN
    part P ON L.l_partkey = P.p_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp PS ON L.l_partkey = PS.ps_partkey AND L.l_suppkey = PS.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY
    L.l_orderkey,
    fo.o_orderdate,
    C.c_name,
    SI.s_name,
    P.p_name,
    SI.n_name,
    SI.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC;

SELECT 
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost
FROM 
    part p

JOIN

sql2:

    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (

        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey

)

    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,

      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-02-01'

order_revenue AS (

           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM filtered_orders fo

sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1996-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
),
line_agg AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    la.total_quantity,
    la.avg_price,
    la.total_orders
FROM part p
JOIN line_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
ORDER BY la.total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND 
    o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01' AND 
    n.n_name IN ('FRANCE', 'GERMANY', 'USA')
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_name IN ('FRANCE', 'GERMANY', 'USA')
)
SELECT 
    fs.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    filtered_suppliers fs ON l.l_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
          AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM customer c
        WHERE c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
    )
GROUP BY 
    fs.n_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC

sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT l_shipmode, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
)
SELECT
    l_shipmode,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM filtered
GROUP BY l_shipmode
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH line_with_orders AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(lo.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(lo.l_extendedprice * (1 - lo.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    line_with_orders lo ON ps.ps_partkey = lo.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN

sql2:
WITH european_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'EUROPE')
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    european_partsupp ep ON p.p_partkey = ep.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    nation n
JOIN 
    supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY

ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT l.l_suppkey,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS rev
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey AND ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    )
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    )
    GROUP BY l.l_suppkey
)
SELECT n.n_name,
       SUM(r.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM nation n
JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN revenue r ON s.s_suppkey = r.l_suppkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE s.s_nationkey IN (
        SELECT n.n_nationkey
        FROM nation n
        WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (
            SELECT r.r_regionkey
            FROM region r
            WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
        )
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
WHERE
    ps.ps_suppkey IN (SELECT s_suppkey FROM asia_suppliers)
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
),
order_revenue AS (
    SELECT fo.o_custkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS rev
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY fo.o_custkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(or2.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM
    order_revenue or2
JOIN customer c ON or2.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
    AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty,
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM
    lineitem
WHERE
    l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus
ORDER BY
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus;
sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT
        l_returnflag,
        l_linestatus,
        l_quantity,
        l_extendedprice,
        l_discount,
        l_tax
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
)
SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
    AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty,
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM
    filtered
GROUP BY
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus
ORDER BY
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
          AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM
    partsupp ps
INNER JOIN asia_suppliers a ON ps.ps_suppkey = a.s_suppkey
INNER JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND ps.ps_suppkey = fl.l_suppkey
)
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem
JOIN 
    orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation ON customer.c_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01'
    AND l_shipdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < '1998-01-01'
),
customer_nation AS (
    SELECT c_custkey, n_name
    FROM customer
    JOIN nation ON customer.c_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
)
SELECT 
    cn.n_name,
    SUM(fl.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    filtered_lineitem fl
JOIN 
    orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer_nation cn ON o.o_custkey = cn.c_custkey
GROUP BY 
    cn.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
),
part_suppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    part_suppliers psu ON p.p_partkey = psu.ps_partkey
JOIN
    filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
WHERE
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'

sql2:
WITH asia_supplier_count AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS supplier_cnt
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) * asc_.supplier_cnt AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    asia_supplier_count asc_ ON asc_.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, asc_.supplier_cnt
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supplier_counts AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS num_suppliers
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_orderkey IN (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o
        WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_quantity * sc.num_suppliers) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * sc.num_suppliers) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN supplier_counts sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON fl.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql2:
WITH part_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey AS p_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        l.l_partkey IN (SELECT p.p_partkey FROM part p)
        AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        l.l_partkey
)
SELECT p_partkey, revenue
FROM part_revenue
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT n.n_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT s.s_nationkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS vol
    FROM lineitem l,
         orders o,
         customer c,
         supplier s,
         partsupp ps
    WHERE l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
      AND o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
      AND l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
      AND l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
      AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT n.n_name,
       SUM(base.vol) AS revenue
FROM base
JOIN nation n ON base.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH part_agg AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey AS p_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
    GROUP BY
        l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    pa.p_partkey,
    pa.total_quantity,
    pa.avg_price,
    pa.total_orders
FROM
    part_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.p_partkey
ORDER BY
    pa.total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;

WITH ps_nation AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, n.n_name
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
part_line AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey)
)
SELECT
    pn.n_name,

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    nation n
JOIN
    supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC;
sql2:

    SELECT o.o_orderkey
    FROM orders o

      AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1995-12-31'
),
line_revenue AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l

        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
)

    n.n_name,

    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

filtered_lineitems AS (

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE
    p.p_retailprice > 100.00
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH supply_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    sa.total_supply_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    supply_agg sa ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON sa.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE
    p.p_retailprice > 100.00
ORDER BY
    total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 100;

    SELECT DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA')

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1993-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1994-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY

sql2:
WITH order_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_custkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS rev
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1993-01-01'
        AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1994-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        o.o_custkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation,
    SUM(or_rev.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM
    order_revenue or_rev
JOIN
    customer c ON or_rev.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
JOIN

        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_extendedprice,

            FROM orders o
            WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
              AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1993-01-01' AND DATE '1993-12-31'
        )
),
supplier_revenue AS (

        ps.ps_partkey,

)
SELECT

order_lines AS (

    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH part_supplier AS (
    SELECT p.p_name, s.s_name, ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_availqty, ps.ps_supplycost
    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, o.o_orderkey
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
)
SELECT
    ps.p_name,
    ps.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ol.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    part_supplier ps
JOIN
    order_lines ol ON ps.ps_partkey = ol.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    ps.p_name, ps.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'EUROPE' 
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1994-01-01' AND DATE '1994-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH euro_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey AND r.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    )
),
euro_part_counts AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM partsupp ps
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey IN (SELECT s_suppkey FROM euro_suppliers)
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) * epc.cnt AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    euro_part_counts epc ON p.p_partkey = epc.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1994-01-01' AND DATE '1994-12-31'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, epc.cnt
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_sales
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    c.c_acctbal > 1000
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH qualified_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM customer c
        WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
          AND c.c_acctbal > 1000
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_sales
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN
    qualified_orders qo ON l.l_orderkey = qo.o_orderkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    sum(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= '1994-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM orders o
            JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
            WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
              AND o.o_orderdate >= '1994-01-01'
              AND o.o_orderdate < '1995-01-01'
        )
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    sum(fl.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    filtered_lineitem fl
JOIN
    supplier s ON fl.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON fl.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH revenue_by_nation AS (
    SELECT
        n.n_name,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM orders o
            JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
            WHERE l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        )
)
SELECT
    n_name,
    SUM(line_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_by_nation
GROUP BY
    n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH part_supplier AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
part_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_orderkey
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(pl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(pl.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pl.l_orderkey) AS order_count
FROM part p
JOIN part_supplier psu ON p.p_partkey = psu.ps_partkey
JOIN part_lines pl ON p.p_partkey = pl.l_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_availqty DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    pa.total_availqty,
    pa.avg_supplycost
FROM
    ps_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON pa.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_availqty DESC

sql1:

WHERE

sql2:

part_supplier AS (

           SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost

sql1:

    p.p_name,
    p.p_size,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
FROM
    part p

    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

    p.p_partkey,

sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    JOIN
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asian_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_regionkey = (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA')
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM part p
JOIN filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN asian_partsupp ap ON p.p_partkey = ap.ps_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'Europe'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH european_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND r.r_name = 'Europe'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    es.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM
    partsupp ps
JOIN european_suppliers es ON ps.ps_suppkey = es.s_suppkey
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, es.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    customer 
JOIN 
    orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey 
JOIN 
    supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey 
GROUP BY 
    n_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_per_line AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
        INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        INNER JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(r.line_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_per_line r
    INNER JOIN nation n ON r.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    l.l_orderkey, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) * (1 + l.l_tax)) AS total_revenue_with_tax,
    o.o_orderdate,
    c.c_mktsegment 
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
GROUP BY 
    l.l_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, c.c_mktsegment 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH order_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) * (1 + l.l_tax)) AS total_revenue_with_tax
    FROM
        lineitem l
    GROUP BY
        l.l_orderkey
)
SELECT
    r.l_orderkey,
    r.revenue,
    r.total_revenue_with_tax,
    o.o_orderdate,
    c.c_mktsegment
FROM
    order_revenue r
JOIN
    orders o ON r.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
ORDER BY
    r.revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:

    p.p_name,

    part p

    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey

    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'

sql2:

    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'

revenue_by_part AS (

SELECT

GROUP BY

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(l.l_discount) AS total_discount,
    SUM((l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount))) AS net_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           l.l_quantity,
           l.l_extendedprice,
           l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(ol.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(ol.l_discount) AS total_discount,
    SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS net_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    order_lines ol ON p.p_partkey = ol.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
    AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty,
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM 
    lineitem
WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' 
    AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY 
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus;
sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT
        l_returnflag,
        l_linestatus,
        l_quantity,
        l_extendedprice,
        l_discount,
        l_tax
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
        AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
)
SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge,
    SUM(l_quantity) / COUNT(*) AS avg_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) / COUNT(*) AS avg_price,
    SUM(l_discount) / COUNT(*) AS avg_disc,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM
    filtered
GROUP BY
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus
ORDER BY
    l_returnflag, l_linestatus;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'Asia'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1994-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name = 'Asia'
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name,

ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;

SELECT

    p.p_name, 
    p.p_retailprice,

FROM

GROUP BY

WITH supplier_totals AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_suppkey,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
    FROM
        lineitem l
    WHERE
        l.l_orderkey IN (SELECT o.o_orderkey FROM orders o)
    GROUP BY
        l.l_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_retailprice,
    s.s_name,
    s.s_acctbal,

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= '1996-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1996-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1997-01-01'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
        JOIN filtered_orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    rv.total_revenue
FROM
    revenue rv
    JOIN nation n ON rv.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
ORDER BY
    rv.total_revenue DESC;

SELECT

    p.p_size,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
WHERE
    ps.ps_suppkey IN (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey
        FROM supplier s
        WHERE s.s_nationkey IN (
            SELECT n.n_nationkey
            FROM nation n
            WHERE EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM region r
                WHERE r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
                  AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
            )
        )
    )
GROUP BY
    p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size
ORDER BY
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

    part p

    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey

    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    ps.ps_supplycost,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_extended_price
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN

sql2:
SELECT
    q.p_partkey,
    q.p_name,
    q.s_name,
    q.ps_supplycost,
    q.ps_availqty,
    q.total_quantity,

FROM (

        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,

    FROM

        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, ps.ps_supplycost, ps.ps_availqty

    q.total_quantity > 1000
ORDER BY
    q.total_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 10;

    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT
    ps2.p_name,
    ps2.s_name,
    SUM(lo.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(lo.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part_supplier ps2
JOIN
    line_orders lo ON ps2.ps_partkey = lo.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    ps2.p_name,
    ps2.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-31'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1997-01-31'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS rev
    FROM
        lineitem l,
        filtered_orders o,
        customer c,
        supplier s,
        partsupp ps
    WHERE
        l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        AND o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        AND l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        AND l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(r.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue r
JOIN
    nation n ON r.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,

    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'EUROPE' AND 
    l.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND

GROUP BY

ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH european_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND r.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    european_partsupp ep ON p.p_partkey = ep.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND
    l.l_shipdate < '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p_brand,
    AVG(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS avg_price,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    part
JOIN
    lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey
JOIN
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
GROUP BY
    p_brand
ORDER BY
    avg_price DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT
        l_partkey,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS net_price,
        l_quantity,
        l_orderkey
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_orderkey IN (SELECT o_orderkey FROM orders)
)
SELECT
    p.p_brand,
    AVG(ol.net_price) AS avg_price,
    SUM(ol.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ol.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    order_lines ol ON p.p_partkey = ol.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_brand
ORDER BY
    avg_price DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_availqty DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supplycost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    pa.total_availqty,
    pa.avg_supplycost
FROM
    ps_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = pa.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_availqty DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
),
supplier_nation AS (

sql1:
SELECT
    nation.n_name,
    region.r_name,
    SUM(lineitem.l_extendedprice * (1 - lineitem.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    customer
JOIN
    orders ON customer.c_custkey = orders.o_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem ON orders.o_orderkey = lineitem.l_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier ON lineitem.l_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ON lineitem.l_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey AND supplier.s_suppkey = partsupp.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region ON nation.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
WHERE
    lineitem.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND lineitem.l_shipdate < '1997-01-31'
GROUP BY
    nation.n_name, region.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT
        l_orderkey,
        l_partkey,
        l_suppkey,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < '1997-01-31'
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        n.n_name,
        r.r_name AS r_name,
        n.n_nationkey
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    sn.n_name,
    sn.r_name,
    SUM(fl.line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM
    filtered_lineitem fl
JOIN orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN supplier_nation sn ON fl.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON fl.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND fl.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY
    sn.n_name, sn.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC;

filtered_lineitems AS (

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM 
    part AS p
JOIN 
    partsupp AS ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier AS s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region AS r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand, p.p_type
ORDER BY 
    total_available_qty DESC, avg_supply_cost ASC;
sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier AS s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation AS n
        JOIN region AS r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM
    partsupp AS ps
JOIN
    part AS p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    asia_suppliers AS a ON ps.ps_suppkey = a.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_brand, p.p_type
ORDER BY
    total_available_qty DESC, avg_supply_cost ASC;

    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_extended_price,
    AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_acctbal

       SUM(l.l_quantity)        AS total_quantity,

        )
    GROUP BY
        l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    la.part_total_qty AS total_quantity,
    la.part_total_rev AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    line_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price, n_name
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n_name
ORDER BY avg_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH customer_nation AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, n.n_name
    FROM customer c
    JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
order_prices AS (
    SELECT cn.n_name, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN customer_nation cn ON o.o_custkey = cn.c_custkey
)
SELECT AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price, n_name
FROM order_prices
GROUP BY n_name
ORDER BY avg_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM lineitem
WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
  AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
GROUP BY l_partkey
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH partrev AS (
    SELECT l_partkey,
           SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-02-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT l_partkey, revenue
FROM partrev
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH supplier_cnt AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
),
line_agg AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           SUM(l.l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS sum_price
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    la.sum_qty * sc.cnt AS total_quantity,
    la.sum_price * sc.cnt AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN supplier_cnt sc ON sc.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN line_agg la ON la.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation,
    r.r_name AS region,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, c.c_nationkey
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
line_revenue AS (
    SELECT fo.c_nationkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY fo.c_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation,
    r.r_name AS region,
    lr.revenue
FROM line_revenue lr
JOIN nation n ON lr.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
ORDER BY lr.revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asian_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA'
          AND s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    )
),
part_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_partkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM partsupp ps
          JOIN asian_suppliers asup ON ps.ps_suppkey = asup.s_suppkey
          WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
      )
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    pr.revenue
FROM part p
JOIN part_revenue pr ON p.p_partkey = pr.l_partkey
ORDER BY pr.revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey

sql2:

    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'

    COUNT(DISTINCT l_orderkey) AS order_count,
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue

GROUP BY l_shipmode
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_suppkey, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_suppkey 
ORDER BY 
    total_supply_cost DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supply_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_suppkey,
    sa.total_supply_cost
FROM
    supply_agg sa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = sa.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    n.n_name AS nation,
    r.r_name AS region
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, n.n_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01' AND l_shipdate < '1997-01-01'
),
supplier_region AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, n.n_name, r.r_name
    FROM supplier s, nation n, region r
    WHERE s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
      AND n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    sr.n_name AS nation,
    sr.r_name AS region
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN
    supplier_region sr ON fl.l_suppkey = sr.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, sr.n_name, sr.r_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_sales,
    AVG(l.l_discount) AS average_discount
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    r.r_name = 'EUROPE' AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH european_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_regionkey = (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'EUROPE')
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_sales,
    AVG(l.l_discount) AS average_discount
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    european_partsupp eps ON p.p_partkey = eps.ps_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate <= '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name, 
    s.s_acctbal AS supplier_balance, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 10000
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC;
sql2:
WITH sales_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        s.s_name AS supplier_name, 
        s.s_acctbal AS supplier_balance, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal
)
SELECT 
    p_partkey, 
    p_name, 
    supplier_name, 
    supplier_balance, 
    total_sales
FROM 
    sales_agg
WHERE 
    total_sales > 10000
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC;

    p.p_partkey,

    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN

JOIN

JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey

sql2:
WITH supplier_count AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(*) AS num_suppliers
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
),
line_agg AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           SUM(l.l_quantity) AS base_quantity,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS base_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    la.base_quantity * sc.num_suppliers AS total_quantity,
    la.base_revenue * sc.num_suppliers AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN supplier_count sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
JOIN line_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    customer c
JOIN
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_suppkey, l.l_partkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM filtered_orders o
    JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(ol.revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    order_lines ol
JOIN
    supplier s ON ol.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON ol.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey

sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,

    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost

    total_supply_cost DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    l_returnflag, 
    l_linestatus, 
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_discounted_price, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge, 
    COUNT(*) AS count_order 
FROM 
    lineitem 
WHERE 
    l_shipdate <= DATE '1997-10-31' 
GROUP BY 
    l_returnflag, 
    l_linestatus 
ORDER BY 
    l_returnflag, 
    l_linestatus;
sql2:
WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT
        l_returnflag,
        l_linestatus,
        l_quantity,
        l_extendedprice,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS disc_price,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax) AS charge
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate <= DATE '1997-10-31'
)
SELECT
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
    SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price,
    SUM(disc_price) AS sum_discounted_price,
    SUM(charge) AS sum_charge,
    COUNT(*) AS count_order
FROM
    filtered
GROUP BY
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus
ORDER BY
    l_returnflag,
    l_linestatus;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_by_customer AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_nationkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS cust_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l,
        orders o,
        customer c
    WHERE
        l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        AND o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
        AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        c.c_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    r.cust_revenue AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_by_customer r
JOIN
    nation n ON r.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY

ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_by_customer AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_nationkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS rev
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE
        l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    GROUP BY
        c.c_nationkey
)
SELECT
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    rc.rev AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_by_customer rc
JOIN
    nation n ON rc.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql2:

        o.o_custkey,

    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    sum(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    avg(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    avg(l.l_discount) AS avg_discount
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH asian_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
          AND r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    sum(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    avg(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    avg(l.l_discount) AS avg_discount
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    asian_partsupp aps ON p.p_partkey = aps.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT n.n_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM customer c
JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_suppkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo
        JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
        WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
),
supplier_revenue AS (
    SELECT s.s_nationkey, SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM order_lines ol
    JOIN supplier s ON ol.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON ol.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_nationkey
)
SELECT n.n_name, sr.total_revenue
FROM supplier_revenue sr
JOIN nation n ON sr.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
ORDER BY sr.total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    customer 
JOIN 
    orders ON c_custkey = o_custkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey 
JOIN 
    supplier ON s_suppkey = l_suppkey 
JOIN 
    partsupp ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey 
JOIN 
    nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey 
GROUP BY 
    n_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_detail AS (
    SELECT
        n.n_name,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM
        lineitem l
    INNER JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    INNER JOIN nation n ON n.n_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    n_name,
    SUM(line_revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM
    revenue_detail
GROUP BY
    n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    n_name AS nation_name
FROM 
    lineitem
JOIN 
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_suppkey, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
),
supplier_nation AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, n_name
    FROM supplier
    JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    SUM(fl.revenue) AS total_revenue,
    sn.n_name AS nation_name
FROM 
    filtered_lineitem fl
JOIN 
    orders ON fl.l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier_nation sn ON fl.l_suppkey = sn.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    sn.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA')
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN asia_suppliers asup ON p.p_partkey = asup.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_availqty DESC 
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    pa.total_availqty,
    pa.total_supplycost
FROM
    ps_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = pa.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_availqty DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    AND s.s_acctbal > 0
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_nationkey
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 0
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON l.l_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN nation n ON fs.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
)
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH l_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey,
           SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
           SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_price,
           COUNT(*) AS l_cnt
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
),
ps_agg AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey,
           AVG(ps_supplycost) AS avg_cost,
           COUNT(*) AS ps_cnt
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    la.sum_qty * pa.ps_cnt AS total_quantity,
    la.sum_price * pa.ps_cnt AS total_revenue,
    pa.avg_cost AS avg_supply_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    l_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
JOIN
    ps_agg pa ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT

GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    ps_agg.total_available_quantity
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    (SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity
     FROM partsupp
     GROUP BY ps_partkey) ps_agg ON p.p_partkey = ps_agg.ps_partkey
ORDER BY
    ps_agg.total_available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT

    SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM 
    partsupp
JOIN 
    part ON partsupp.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p_name
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH agg AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT p.p_name AS p_name, agg.total_cost
FROM agg
JOIN part p ON agg.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
ORDER BY agg.total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p_name, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM part
JOIN lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_revenue AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
    ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT p.p_name, pr.total_revenue
