        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        s.s_acctbal AS adjusted_acctbal
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
) sd ON n.n_nationkey = sd.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey
    FROM orders o
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM lineitem l
        WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY l.l_orderkey
        HAVING SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 10000
    )
) od ON n.n_nationkey = od.o_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_retailprice,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_mfgr ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM part p
) rp ON rp.rn <= 5
GROUP BY n.n_name, r.r_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT od.o_orderkey) > 5 OR SUM(sd.adjusted_acctbal) > 5000
ORDER BY total_orders DESC, region_name, nation_name

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS acct_rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
AggregateOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' 
        AND o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey
),
CustomerStats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        AVG(o.total_revenue) AS avg_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        customer c
    LEFT JOIN 
        AggregateOrders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey
)
SELECT 
    cs.c_custkey,
    cs.avg_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN cs.order_count > 10 THEN 'High Value'
        WHEN cs.order_count BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Medium Value'
        ELSE 'Low Value'
    END AS customer_value,
    rs.s_name,
    rs.acct_rank
FROM 
    CustomerStats cs
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON cs.avg_revenue > COALESCE((SELECT AVG(total_revenue) FROM AggregateOrders), 0)
WHERE 
    cs.avg_revenue IS NOT NULL 
    AND rs.acct_rank = 1
ORDER BY 
    cs.avg_revenue DESC NULLS LAST;
sql2:
SELECT 
    cs.c_custkey,
    cs.avg_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN cs.order_count > 10 THEN 'High Value'
        WHEN cs.order_count BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'Medium Value'
        ELSE 'Low Value'
    END AS customer_value,
    rs.s_name,
    rs.acct_rank
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            AVG(ao.total_revenue) AS avg_revenue,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ao.o_orderkey) AS order_count
        FROM 
            customer c
        LEFT JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    o.o_orderkey, 
                    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
                FROM 
                    orders o
                INNER JOIN 
                    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                WHERE 
                    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' 
                    AND o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
                GROUP BY 
                    o.o_orderkey
            ) ao ON c.c_custkey = ao.o_orderkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey
    ) cs
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_name, 
            s.s_acctbal,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS acct_rank
        FROM 
            supplier s
        INNER JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        INNER JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    ) rs
WHERE 
    cs.avg_revenue IS NOT NULL 
    AND rs.acct_rank = 1
    AND cs.avg_revenue > COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT AVG(sub.total_revenue) 
            FROM (
                SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
                FROM orders o
                INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
                WHERE o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' 
                    AND o.o_orderstatus IN ('O', 'F')
                GROUP BY o.o_orderkey
            ) sub
        ), 0)
ORDER BY 
    cs.avg_revenue DESC NULLS LAST;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
),
PartPriceDetails AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_retailprice,
           SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM part p
    LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_retailprice
),
HighValueCustomers AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_acctbal,
           CASE WHEN c.c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) FROM customer c2) 
                THEN 'High Value' ELSE 'Low Value' END AS customer_type
    FROM customer c
    WHERE c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT COALESCE(n.n_name, 'Unknown Region') AS nation_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
       AVG(l.l_discount * l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_discounted_price,
       SUM(p.p_retailprice) AS total_part_price,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rs.rank = 1 THEN rs.s_name END) AS top_supplier,
       COUNT(hc.c_custkey) FILTER (WHERE hc.customer_type = 'High Value') AS high_value_count
FROM orders o
JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
FULL OUTER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN RankedSuppliers rs ON c.c_nationkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN HighValueCustomers hc ON c.c_custkey = hc.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN PartPriceDetails p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
  AND (c.c_acctbal IS NULL OR c.c_acctbal > 0)
GROUP BY n.n_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 10
ORDER BY total_orders DESC, total_part_price ASC;
sql2:
SELECT COALESCE(n.n_name, 'Unknown Region') AS nation_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
       AVG(l.l_discount * l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_discounted_price,
       SUM(p.p_retailprice) AS total_part_price,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rs.rank = 1 THEN rs.s_name END) AS top_supplier,
       SUM(CASE WHEN hc.customer_type = 'High Value' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_value_count
FROM orders o
JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
FULL OUTER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY n.n_nationkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE s.s_acctbal IS NOT NULL
) rs ON c.c_nationkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_acctbal,
           CASE WHEN c.c_acctbal > avg_tbl.avg_bal
                THEN 'High Value' ELSE 'Low Value' END AS customer_type
    FROM customer c
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG(c2.c_acctbal) AS avg_bal FROM customer c2) avg_tbl
    WHERE c.c_acctbal IS NOT NULL
) hc ON c.c_custkey = hc.c_custkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_retailprice,
           SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM part p
    LEFT JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_retailprice
) p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN nation n ON c.c_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE l.l_shipdate >= '1995-01-01'
  AND l.l_shipdate <= '1995-12-31'
  AND (c.c_acctbal IS NULL OR c.c_acctbal > 0)
GROUP BY n.n_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 10
ORDER BY total_orders DESC, total_part_price ASC

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank,
        p.p_partkey
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey,
        c.c_name,
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_totalprice,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) = 0 THEN NULL 
            ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey)
        END AS unique_suppliers
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice
),
TopRegions AS (
    SELECT 
        r.r_regionkey,
        r.r_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice) DESC) AS region_rank
    FROM 
        region r
    JOIN 
        nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
    HAVING 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice) > 0
)
SELECT 
    co.c_name,
    co.o_orderkey,
    co.total_revenue,
    COALESCE(rs.s_name, 'Unknown Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    tr.r_name AS region_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN co.o_totalprice IS NULL THEN 'No Total Price Available'
        ELSE CASE 
            WHEN co.total_revenue > co.o_totalprice THEN 'Profitable'
            ELSE 'Non-Profitable'
        END
    END AS profitability_status
FROM 
    CustomerOrders co
LEFT JOIN 
    RankedSuppliers rs ON co.o_orderkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    TopRegions tr ON tr.region_rank = 1  
WHERE 
    (co.unique_suppliers IS NULL OR co.unique_suppliers > 5)
    AND co.total_revenue IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    co.total_revenue DESC, co.o_orderkey;
sql2:
SELECT 
    co.c_name,
    co.o_orderkey,
    co.total_revenue,
    COALESCE(rs.s_name, 'Unknown Supplier') AS supplier_name,
    tr.r_name AS region_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN co.o_totalprice IS NULL THEN 'No Total Price Available'
        WHEN co.total_revenue > co.o_totalprice THEN 'Profitable'
        ELSE 'Non-Profitable'
    END AS profitability_status
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey,
            c.c_name,
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_totalprice,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
            CASE 
                WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) = 0 THEN NULL 
                ELSE COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey)
            END AS unique_suppliers
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        LEFT JOIN 
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name, o.o_orderkey, o.o_totalprice
        HAVING 
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) IS NOT NULL
            AND (COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) = 0 OR COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) > 5)
    ) co
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_acctbal,
            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rank,
            p.p_partkey
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    ) rs ON co.o_orderkey = rs.s_suppkey
LEFT JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            r.r_regionkey,
            r.r_name
        FROM 
            region r
        WHERE 
            r.r_regionkey = (
                SELECT r2.r_regionkey
                FROM region r2
                JOIN nation n2 ON r2.r_regionkey = n2.n_regionkey
                JOIN supplier s2 ON n2.n_nationkey = s2.s_nationkey
                JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
                JOIN lineitem l2 ON ps2.ps_partkey = l2.l_partkey
                GROUP BY r2.r_regionkey
                HAVING SUM(l2.l_extendedprice) > 0
                ORDER BY SUM(l2.l_extendedprice) DESC
                LIMIT 1
            )
    ) tr ON 1 = 1
ORDER BY 
    co.total_revenue DESC, co.o_orderkey;

sql1:
WITH RankedOrders AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY o.o_orderstatus ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM
        orders o
    WHERE
        o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
        AND o.o_orderdate <= DATE '1997-12-31'
),
SupplierStats AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_nationkey,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_nationkey
),
OrderDetails AS (
    SELECT
        l.l_orderkey,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
        COUNT(*) AS item_count
    FROM
        lineitem l
    GROUP BY
        l.l_orderkey
),
UnionedResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.r_name,
        ss.supplier_count,
        ss.total_avail_qty,
        ss.avg_supply_cost,
        COALESCE(od.revenue, 0) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        region r
    LEFT JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN SupplierStats ss ON n.n_nationkey = ss.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN OrderDetails od ON ss.supplier_count = (SELECT MAX(supplier_count) FROM SupplierStats)
)
SELECT
    ur.r_name,
    ur.supplier_count,
    ur.total_avail_qty,
    ur.avg_supply_cost,
    ur.total_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN ur.total_revenue IS NULL THEN 'No Revenue'
        WHEN ur.total_revenue > 100000 THEN 'High Revenue'
        ELSE 'Low Revenue' 
    END AS revenue_category
FROM
    UnionedResults ur
WHERE
    ur.avg_supply_cost IS NOT NULL
    OR ur.total_avail_qty = (SELECT MAX(total_avail_qty) FROM SupplierStats)
ORDER BY
    ur.total_revenue DESC,
    ur.supplier_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.r_name,
    sub.supplier_count,
    sub.total_avail_qty,
    sub.avg_supply_cost,
    sub.total_revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN sub.total_revenue IS NULL THEN 'No Revenue'
        WHEN sub.total_revenue > 100000 THEN 'High Revenue'
        ELSE 'Low Revenue' 
    END AS revenue_category
FROM (
    SELECT
        r.r_name,
        ss.supplier_count,
        ss.total_avail_qty,
        ss.avg_supply_cost,
        COALESCE(od.revenue, 0) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        region r
    LEFT JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            s.s_nationkey,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
            SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
            AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
        FROM
            supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY
            s.s_nationkey
    ) ss ON n.n_nationkey = ss.s_nationkey
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            l.l_orderkey,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
            COUNT(*) AS item_count
        FROM
            lineitem l
        GROUP BY
            l.l_orderkey
    ) od ON ss.supplier_count = (
        SELECT MAX(ss2.supplier_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT
                s2.s_nationkey,
                COUNT(DISTINCT ps2.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
            FROM
                supplier s2
            JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY
                s2.s_nationkey
        ) ss2
    )
) sub
WHERE
    sub.avg_supply_cost IS NOT NULL
    OR sub.total_avail_qty = (
        SELECT MAX(ss3.total_avail_qty)
        FROM (
            SELECT
                s3.s_nationkey,
                SUM(ps3.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty
            FROM
                supplier s3
            JOIN partsupp ps3 ON s3.s_suppkey = ps3.ps_suppkey
            GROUP BY
                s3.s_nationkey
        ) ss3
    )
ORDER BY
    sub.total_revenue DESC,
    sub.supplier_count DESC;

sql1:
WITH RecursivePart AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_brand, p_retailprice, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p_mfgr ORDER BY p_retailprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size IN (SELECT DISTINCT p_size FROM part WHERE p_type LIKE '%screw%')
),
FilteredNations AS (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name, r_name AS region_name
    FROM nation
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
    WHERE n_name NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING(c_name, 1, 5) FROM customer WHERE c_acctbal > 1000)
),
OrderStats AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders
    JOIN lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1996-01-01'
    GROUP BY o_orderkey, o_custkey
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, MAX(ps_supplycost) AS max_supply_cost
    FROM supplier
    JOIN partsupp ON s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s_suppkey, s_name
    HAVING COUNT(ps_partkey) > 5
)
SELECT P.p_partkey, P.p_name, R.region_name, O.total_revenue,
       S.max_supply_cost,
       CASE 
           WHEN O.total_revenue IS NULL THEN 'No Revenue'
           ELSE 'Revenue Exists'
       END AS revenue_status,
       CONCAT('Part: ', P.p_name, ' | Max Cost: ', COALESCE(S.max_supply_cost::TEXT, 'N/A')) AS details
FROM RecursivePart P
LEFT JOIN FilteredNations R ON R.n_nationkey = (SELECT n_nationkey FROM nation ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN OrderStats O ON O.o_custkey = (SELECT c_custkey FROM customer WHERE c_nationkey = R.n_nationkey LIMIT 1)
FULL OUTER JOIN SupplierDetails S ON S.s_suppkey = (SELECT ps_suppkey FROM partsupp WHERE ps_partkey = P.p_partkey ORDER BY ps_supplycost DESC LIMIT 1)
WHERE P.price_rank = 1 AND (S.max_supply_cost IS NULL OR S.max_supply_cost > 100)
ORDER BY R.region_name, P.p_retailprice DESC;
sql2:
SELECT P.p_partkey, P.p_name, R.region_name, O.total_revenue,
       S.max_supply_cost,
       CASE 
           WHEN O.total_revenue IS NULL THEN 'No Revenue'
           ELSE 'Revenue Exists'
       END AS revenue_status,
       CONCAT('Part: ', P.p_name, ' | Max Cost: ', COALESCE(S.max_supply_cost::TEXT, 'N/A')) AS details
FROM (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_brand, p_retailprice,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p_mfgr ORDER BY p_retailprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM part
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p2 WHERE p2.p_type LIKE '%screw%' AND p2.p_size = part.p_size)
) P
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT n_nationkey, n_name, r_name AS region_name
    FROM nation
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM customer WHERE c_acctbal > 1000 AND SUBSTRING(c_name, 1, 5) = n_name
    )
) R ON R.n_nationkey = (SELECT n_nationkey FROM nation ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1)
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders
    JOIN lineitem ON o_orderkey = l_orderkey
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1996-01-01'
    GROUP BY o_orderkey, o_custkey
) O ON O.o_custkey = (SELECT c_custkey FROM customer WHERE c_nationkey = R.n_nationkey LIMIT 1)
FULL OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, max_supply_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, MAX(ps_supplycost) AS max_supply_cost, COUNT(ps_partkey) AS part_count
        FROM supplier
        JOIN partsupp ON s_suppkey = ps_suppkey
        GROUP BY s_suppkey, s_name
    ) sd
    WHERE part_count > 5
) S ON S.s_suppkey = (SELECT ps_suppkey FROM partsupp WHERE ps_partkey = P.p_partkey ORDER BY ps_supplycost DESC LIMIT 1)
WHERE P.price_rank = 1 AND (S.max_supply_cost IS NULL OR S.max_supply_cost > 100)
ORDER BY R.region_name, P.p_retailprice DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    SUBSTRING(p.p_name, 1, 10) AS short_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
    MAX(l.l_discount) AS max_discount,
    MIN(l.l_tax) AS min_tax
FROM 
    part AS p
JOIN 
    partsupp AS ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier AS s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem AS l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
WHERE 
    p.p_retailprice > 50.00 AND 
    s.s_acctbal < 1000.00 AND 
    l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    short_name
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, total_quantity ASC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, SUBSTRING(p_name, 1, 10) AS short_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_retailprice > 50.00
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal < 1000.00
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_quantity, l_extendedprice, l_discount, l_tax
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    fp.short_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fs.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(fl.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
    MAX(fl.l_discount) AS max_discount,
    MIN(fl.l_tax) AS min_tax
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN filtered_lineitem fl ON ps.ps_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP BY 
    fp.short_name
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, total_quantity ASC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS order_count,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 15) AS short_comment,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    UPPER(p.p_name) LIKE '%METAL%'
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, r.r_name, p.p_comment
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, part_name ASC;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        p.p_comment,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice
    FROM 
        part p
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        UPPER(p.p_name) LIKE '%METAL%'
        AND o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01'
        AND o.o_orderdate <= '1997-12-31'
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT 
        part_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
        SUBSTRING(p_comment, 1, 15) AS short_comment,
        region_name
    FROM base
    GROUP BY part_name, region_name, p_comment
)
SELECT 
    part_name,
    order_count,
    total_quantity,
    avg_price,
    short_comment,
    region_name
FROM aggregated
WHERE total_quantity > 100
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, part_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS avg_price_after_discount,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    LEFT(p.p_comment, 15) AS short_comment
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    p.p_size IN (10, 20, 30)
    AND s.s_acctbal > 1000.00
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, p.p_comment
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_price_after_discount DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
),
filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size IN (10, 20, 30)
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 1000.00
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        fp.p_name,
        fs.s_name,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS avg_price_after_discount,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS order_count,
        LEFT(fp.p_comment, 15) AS short_comment
    FROM
        filtered_parts fp
    JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON fp.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
    GROUP BY
        fp.p_name, fs.s_name, fp.p_comment
)
SELECT p_name, s_name, total_quantity, avg_price_after_discount, order_count, short_comment
FROM aggregated
WHERE total_quantity > 100
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, avg_price_after_discount DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    SUBSTRING(p.p_name, 1, 20) AS short_part_name, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price, 
    MAX(l.l_tax) AS max_tax_rate
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_custkey = l.l_orderkey 
WHERE 
    p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 25 
    AND s.s_acctbal > 1000 
    AND l.l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01' 
GROUP BY 
    SUBSTRING(p.p_name, 1, 20)
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5 
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 1000
),
filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, SUBSTRING(p_name, 1, 20) AS short_part_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 25
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        fp.short_part_name,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_tax
    FROM filtered_parts fp
    JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = l.l_orderkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01'
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        short_part_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
        MAX(l_tax) AS max_tax_rate
    FROM base
    GROUP BY short_part_name
)
SELECT
    short_part_name,
    supplier_count,
    total_quantity,
    avg_extended_price,
    max_tax_rate
FROM aggregated
WHERE supplier_count > 5
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

sql1:
WITH SupplierInfo AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
PartDetails AS (
    SELECT p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size, p.p_retailprice,
           SUBSTRING(p.p_comment FROM 1 FOR 22) AS short_comment
    FROM part p
),
OrdersSummary AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
           COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_suppkey) AS supplier_count, o.o_orderdate
    FROM orders o
    JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
),
SupplierSales AS (
    SELECT si.nation_name, pd.p_brand, SUM(os.total_sales) AS sales_sum
    FROM SupplierInfo si
    JOIN partsupp ps ON si.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN PartDetails pd ON ps.ps_partkey = pd.p_partkey
    JOIN OrdersSummary os ON ps.ps_partkey = os.o_orderkey 
    GROUP BY si.nation_name, pd.p_brand
)
SELECT nation_name, p_brand, sales_sum,
       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY nation_name ORDER BY sales_sum DESC) AS rank
FROM SupplierSales
WHERE sales_sum > 1000
ORDER BY nation_name, rank;
sql2:
SELECT
    sub.nation_name,
    sub.p_brand,
    sub.sales_sum,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sub.nation_name ORDER BY sub.sales_sum DESC) AS rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        p.p_brand,
        SUM(agg.total_sales) AS sales_sum
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN (
        SELECT o.o_orderkey,
               SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
        FROM orders o
        JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY o.o_orderkey
    ) agg ON ps.ps_partkey = agg.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY n.n_name, p.p_brand
    HAVING SUM(agg.total_sales) > 1000
) sub
ORDER BY sub.nation_name, rank;

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_brand, 
        p.p_type, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        ps.ps_availqty, 
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
),
FilteredParts AS (
    SELECT 
        rp.p_partkey, 
        rp.p_name, 
        rp.p_brand, 
        rp.p_type, 
        rp.p_retailprice, 
        rp.ps_availqty
    FROM 
        RankedParts rp
    WHERE 
        rp.rank <= 5
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_name, 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        o.o_totalprice
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
)
SELECT 
    f.p_brand, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT co.o_orderkey) AS order_count, 
    SUM(co.o_totalprice) AS total_revenue, 
    MAX(co.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
FROM 
    FilteredParts f
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON f.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    CustomerOrders co ON l.l_orderkey = co.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    f.p_brand
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    f.p_brand, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count, 
    SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_revenue, 
    MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date
FROM 
    (
        SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_brand, p_type, p_retailprice, ps_availqty
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                p.p_partkey, 
                p.p_name, 
                p.p_brand, 
                p.p_type, 
                p.p_retailprice, 
                ps.ps_availqty, 
                RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rnk
            FROM 
                part p
            JOIN 
                partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
        ) ranked
        WHERE rnk <= 5
    ) f
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON f.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey)
GROUP BY 
    f.p_brand
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
WITH String_Processing AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name,
        c.c_name,
        CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name) AS description,
        LENGTH(CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name)) AS total_length,
        SUBSTRING(CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name), 1, 50) AS short_description
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        customer c ON s.s_nationkey = c.c_nationkey 
    WHERE 
        p.p_size IN (SELECT DISTINCT p2.p_size FROM part p2 WHERE p2.p_retailprice > 100)
    ORDER BY 
        total_length DESC
)
SELECT 
    description,
    total_length
FROM 
    String_Processing
WHERE 
    total_length > 100
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name) AS description,
    LENGTH(CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name)) AS total_length
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON s.s_nationkey = c.c_nationkey
WHERE 
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p2 WHERE p2.p_retailprice > 100 AND p2.p_size = p.p_size)
    AND LENGTH(CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name)) > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_length DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ' - Part: ', p.p_name, ' | ', 
           'Cost: ', CAST(ps.ps_supplycost AS DECIMAL(10, 2)), ' | ', 
           'Comment: ', SUBSTRING(ps.ps_comment, 1, 50)) AS detail
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    LENGTH(p.p_name) > 10 
    AND p.p_container LIKE '%box%' 
    AND LOWER(s.s_comment) LIKE '%reliable%'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    ps.ps_supplycost, 
    ps.ps_comment
ORDER BY 
    s.s_name ASC, 
    ps.ps_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 20;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_container
    FROM part
    WHERE LENGTH(p_name) > 10
      AND p_container LIKE '%box%'
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name
    FROM supplier
    WHERE LOWER(s_comment) LIKE '%reliable%'
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name, 
    fs.s_name, 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', fs.s_name, ' - Part: ', fp.p_name, ' | ', 
           'Cost: ', CAST(ps.ps_supplycost AS DECIMAL(10, 2)), ' | ', 
           'Comment: ', SUBSTRING(ps.ps_comment, 1, 50)) AS detail
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    fp.p_name, 
    fs.s_name, 
    ps.ps_supplycost, 
    ps.ps_comment
ORDER BY 
    fs.s_name ASC, 
    ps.ps_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 20;

sql1:
SELECT 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Part: ', p.p_name) AS supplier_part_info,
    UPPER(p.p_type) AS upper_part_type,
    LENGTH(p.p_comment) AS comment_length
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderstatus = 'O' 
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, p.p_name, p.p_type, p.p_comment
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_extended_price ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderstatus = 'O'
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_orderkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
      AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
),
agg AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        p.p_type,
        p.p_comment,
        SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(fl.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
        COUNT(DISTINCT fl.l_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_name, p.p_name, p.p_type, p.p_comment
)
SELECT
    supplier_name,
    part_name,
    total_quantity,
    avg_extended_price,
    order_count,
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', supplier_name, ', Part: ', part_name) AS supplier_part_info,
    UPPER(p_type) AS upper_part_type,
    LENGTH(p_comment) AS comment_length
FROM agg
WHERE total_quantity > 100
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC, avg_extended_price ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_brand, 
    p.p_type, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.p_comment) > 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS long_comment_count,
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 20 THEN p.p_retailprice ELSE NULL END) AS avg_retailprice_size_range
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE 'EUROPE%'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand, 
    p.p_type
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, 
    avg_retailprice_size_range ASC;
sql2:
WITH european_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name LIKE 'EUROPE%'
),
brand_type_agg AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(p.p_comment) > 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS long_comment_count,
        AVG(CASE WHEN p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 20 THEN p.p_retailprice ELSE NULL END) AS avg_retailprice_size_range
    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey IN (SELECT s_suppkey FROM european_suppliers)
    GROUP BY p.p_brand, p.p_type
)
SELECT p_brand, p_type, supplier_count, long_comment_count, avg_retailprice_size_range
FROM brand_type_agg
WHERE supplier_count > 5
ORDER BY supplier_count DESC, avg_retailprice_size_range ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' supplies ', p.p_name) AS Supplier_Product,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS Total_Quantity_Supplied,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS Average_Sale_Value,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS Unique_Orders,
    MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS Latest_Shipment,
    MIN(l.l_shipdate) AS Earliest_Shipment
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    s.s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) FROM supplier) 
    AND l.l_returnflag = 'N'
    AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, p.p_name
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) > 100
ORDER BY 
    Total_Quantity_Supplied DESC, Average_Sale_Value ASC;
sql2:
WITH avg_bal AS (
    SELECT AVG(s_acctbal) AS avg_acctbal FROM supplier
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_name,
        p.p_name,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS net_price,
        o.o_orderkey,
        l.l_shipdate
    FROM
        supplier s
    CROSS JOIN avg_bal ab
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE
        s.s_acctbal > ab.avg_acctbal
        AND l.l_returnflag = 'N'
        AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
),
agg AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(s_name, ' supplies ', p_name) AS Supplier_Product,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS Total_Quantity_Supplied,
        AVG(net_price) AS Average_Sale_Value,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o_orderkey) AS Unique_Orders,
        MAX(l_shipdate) AS Latest_Shipment,
        MIN(l_shipdate) AS Earliest_Shipment
    FROM base
    GROUP BY s_name, p_name
)
SELECT
    Supplier_Product,
    Total_Quantity_Supplied,
    Average_Sale_Value,
    Unique_Orders,
    Latest_Shipment,
    Earliest_Shipment
FROM agg
WHERE Total_Quantity_Supplied > 100
ORDER BY Total_Quantity_Supplied DESC, Average_Sale_Value ASC;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) DESC) AS rank_within_region
    FROM 
        supplier AS s
    JOIN 
        nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region AS r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp AS ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
), NotableSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        rs.s_suppkey,
        rs.s_name,
        rs.region_name,
        rs.part_count,
        rs.rank_within_region
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers AS rs
    WHERE 
        rs.rank_within_region <= 3
)
SELECT 
    ns.s_name,
    ns.region_name,
    ns.part_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) 
     FROM orders AS o 
     JOIN lineitem AS l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey 
     JOIN partsupp AS ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
     WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = ns.s_suppkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    NotableSuppliers AS ns
ORDER BY 
    ns.region_name, ns.part_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    rs.s_name,
    rs.region_name,
    rs.part_count,
    COALESCE(oc.total_orders, 0) AS total_orders
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) DESC) AS rank_within_region
    FROM
        supplier AS s
    JOIN nation AS n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region AS r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN partsupp AS ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
) AS rs
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
    FROM
        orders AS o
    JOIN lineitem AS l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN partsupp AS ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_suppkey
) AS oc ON oc.ps_suppkey = rs.s_suppkey
WHERE
    rs.rank_within_region <= 3
ORDER BY
    rs.region_name, rs.part_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    substr(p_name, 1, 10) AS short_name, 
    count(*) AS part_count, 
    CONCAT(s_name, ', ', s_address) AS supplier_info, 
    r_name AS region_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    part 
JOIN 
    partsupp ON p_partkey = ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    supplier ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem ON ps_partkey = l_partkey 
JOIN 
    orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey 
JOIN 
    customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey 
JOIN 
    nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey 
JOIN 
    region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey 
WHERE 
    l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' 
    AND l_shipdate < '1998-01-01' 
GROUP BY 
    short_name, supplier_info, region_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_partkey, l_suppkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < '1998-01-01'
),
customer_region AS (
    SELECT c_custkey, r_name
    FROM customer
    JOIN nation ON c_nationkey = n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
)
SELECT
    substr(p_name, 1, 10) AS short_name,
    count(*) AS part_count,
    CONCAT(s_name, ', ', s_address) AS supplier_info,
    cr.r_name AS region_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    filtered_lineitem fl
JOIN orders ON fl.l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN customer_region cr ON o_custkey = cr.c_custkey
JOIN partsupp ON fl.l_partkey = ps_partkey AND fl.l_suppkey = ps_suppkey
JOIN part ON ps_partkey = p_partkey
JOIN supplier ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    short_name, supplier_info, region_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Nation: ', n.n_name) AS supplier_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(l.l_discount) AS average_discount,
    MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS last_ship_date,
    LEAST(MAX(l.l_shipdate), MAX(o.o_orderdate)) AS comparison_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 0 THEN 
            (SUM(l.l_extendedprice) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey))
        ELSE 
            0 
    END AS avg_revenue_per_order
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%steel%'
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, n.n_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
        AVG(l.l_discount) AS average_discount,
        MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS last_ship_date,
        LEAST(MAX(l.l_shipdate), MAX(o.o_orderdate)) AS comparison_date
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN
        part p ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE
        p.p_name LIKE '%steel%'
        AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY
        p.p_name, s.s_name, n.n_name
)
SELECT
    p_name,
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s_name, ', Nation: ', n_name) AS supplier_info,
    total_orders,
    total_revenue,
    average_discount,
    last_ship_date,
    comparison_date,
    total_revenue / total_orders AS avg_revenue_per_order
FROM
    base
WHERE
    total_orders > 5
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
    SUM(CASE 
            WHEN LENGTH(p.p_comment) > 15 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS long_comments
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE 'EUROPE%'
    AND p.p_type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_avail_qty DESC, 
    part_name ASC;
sql2:
WITH european_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_nationkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND r.r_name LIKE 'EUROPE%'
    )
),
part_stats AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT es.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_avail_qty,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost,
        SUM(CASE
                WHEN LENGTH(p.p_comment) > 15 THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END) AS long_comments
    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN european_suppliers es ON ps.ps_suppkey = es.s_suppkey
    WHERE p.p_type IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY p.p_name
)
SELECT part_name, supplier_count, total_avail_qty, avg_supply_cost, long_comments
FROM part_stats
WHERE supplier_count > 5
ORDER BY total_avail_qty DESC, part_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS num_suppliers,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
    AVG(p.p_retailprice) AS avg_retail_price,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) DESC) AS type_rank
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    LENGTH(p.p_name) > 5 
    AND p.p_comment LIKE '%quality%'
    AND r.r_name IN ('ASIA', 'EUROPE')
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_type
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 2
ORDER BY 
    avg_retail_price DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH agg AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS num_suppliers,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_qty,
        AVG(p.p_retailprice) AS avg_retail_price,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost,
        p.p_type
    FROM
        part p
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE
        LENGTH(p.p_name) > 5
        AND p.p_comment LIKE '%quality%'
        AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM supplier s
            JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
            JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
            WHERE s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
              AND r.r_name IN ('ASIA', 'EUROPE')
        )
    GROUP BY
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_type
)
SELECT
    p_name,
    num_suppliers,
    total_available_qty,
    avg_retail_price,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p_type ORDER BY total_supplycost DESC) AS type_rank
FROM
    agg
WHERE
    num_suppliers > 2
ORDER BY
    avg_retail_price DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    TRIM(UPPER(p.p_name)) AS processed_name,
    CONCAT(p.p_brand, ' - ', p.p_mfgr) AS brand_mfgr,
    REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'Quality', 'Excellence') AS modified_comment,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_type, 1, 10) AS short_type,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.p_retailprice > 500 THEN 'High'
        WHEN p.p_retailprice BETWEEN 200 AND 500 THEN 'Medium'
        ELSE 'Low'
    END AS price_category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    s.s_acctbal > 1000 
    AND p.p_size IN (SELECT DISTINCT p_size FROM part WHERE p_retailprice < 50)
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, 
    processed_name, 
    p.p_brand, 
    p.p_mfgr, 
    modified_comment, 
    p.p_retailprice, 
    short_type, 
    price_category
ORDER BY 
    processed_name, 
    price_category DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
WITH eligible_sizes AS (
    SELECT p_size
    FROM part
    WHERE p_retailprice < 50
    GROUP BY p_size
),
base AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        TRIM(UPPER(p.p_name)) AS processed_name,
        CONCAT(p.p_brand, ' - ', p.p_mfgr) AS brand_mfgr,
        REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'Quality', 'Excellence') AS modified_comment,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_type, 1, 10) AS short_type,
        CASE 
            WHEN p.p_retailprice > 500 THEN 'High'
            WHEN p.p_retailprice BETWEEN 200 AND 500 THEN 'Medium'
            ELSE 'Low'
        END AS price_category,
        ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM 
        part p
    INNER JOIN eligible_sizes es ON p.p_size = es.p_size
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE 
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey AND s.s_acctbal > 1000)
)
SELECT 
    p_partkey,
    processed_name,
    brand_mfgr,
    modified_comment,
    short_type,
    price_category,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
FROM 
    base
GROUP BY 
    p_partkey,
    processed_name,
    brand_mfgr,
    modified_comment,
    short_type,
    price_category
ORDER BY 
    processed_name,
    price_category DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
),
FilteredSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        rs.s_suppkey,
        rs.s_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        rs.total_cost
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers rs
    JOIN 
        nation n ON rs.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        rs.rank <= 5
)
SELECT 
    fs.s_name,
    fs.region_name,
    fs.total_cost,
    CONCAT(fs.s_name, ' from ', fs.region_name) AS supplier_location,
    LENGTH(fs.s_name) AS name_length
FROM 
    FilteredSuppliers fs
ORDER BY 
    fs.total_cost DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    t.s_name,
    t.region_name,
    t.total_cost,
    CONCAT(t.s_name, ' from ', t.region_name) AS supplier_location,
    LENGTH(t.s_name) AS name_length
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rnk
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, r.r_name
) t
WHERE
    t.rnk <= 5
ORDER BY
    t.total_cost DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_mfgr,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        p.p_size,
        p.p_container,
        p.p_retailprice,
        p.p_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        part p
), 
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        s.s_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS supplier_rank
    FROM 
        partsupp ps
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
), 
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        c.c_name,
        o.o_totalprice,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
)
SELECT 
    rp.p_name AS part_name,
    rp.p_brand AS brand,
    rp.p_retailprice AS price,
    sd.s_name AS supplier_name,
    sd.s_acctbal AS supplier_account_balance,
    co.c_name AS customer_name,
    co.o_totalprice AS order_total,
    co.o_orderdate AS order_date
FROM 
    RankedParts rp
JOIN 
    SupplierDetails sd ON rp.p_partkey = sd.ps_partkey AND sd.supplier_rank = 1
JOIN 
    CustomerOrders co ON co.o_orderkey IN (
        SELECT 
            l.l_orderkey
        FROM 
            lineitem l
        WHERE 
            l.l_partkey = rp.p_partkey
    )
WHERE 
    rp.rank <= 5 AND co.order_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    rp.p_type, rp.p_retailprice DESC, co.o_orderdate DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    rp.p_name AS part_name,
    rp.p_brand AS brand,
    rp.p_retailprice AS price,
    sd.s_name AS supplier_name,
    sd.s_acctbal AS supplier_account_balance,
    co.c_name AS customer_name,
    co.o_totalprice AS order_total,
    co.o_orderdate AS order_date
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type,
            p.p_size, p.p_container, p.p_retailprice, p.p_comment,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rank
        FROM part p
    ) rp
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            ps.ps_partkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, s.s_comment,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.ps_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS supplier_rank
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    ) sd ON rp.p_partkey = sd.ps_partkey AND sd.supplier_rank = 1
JOIN
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = rp.p_partkey
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            o.o_orderkey, c.c_name, o.o_totalprice, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderstatus,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.c_nationkey ORDER BY o.o_orderdate DESC) AS order_rank
        FROM orders o
        JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    ) co ON co.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey AND co.order_rank <= 10
WHERE
    rp.rank <= 5
GROUP BY
    rp.p_type, rp.p_retailprice, rp.p_name, rp.p_brand,
    sd.s_name, sd.s_acctbal,
    co.c_name, co.o_totalprice, co.o_orderdate
ORDER BY
    rp.p_type, rp.p_retailprice DESC, co.o_orderdate DESC

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        rg.r_name AS region_name,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost DESC) AS rn,
        LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
        UPPER(p.p_comment) AS upper_comment
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region rg ON n.n_regionkey = rg.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_size > 10 AND 
        s.s_acctbal > 100.00
), FilteredRankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p_partkey, 
        p_name, 
        supplier_name, 
        region_name, 
        name_length, 
        upper_comment 
    FROM 
        RankedParts 
    WHERE 
        rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    frp.p_name,
    frp.supplier_name,
    frp.region_name,
    frp.name_length,
    CONCAT(frp.upper_comment, ' (Processed)') AS final_comment
FROM 
    FilteredRankedParts frp
ORDER BY 
    frp.name_length DESC, 
    frp.supplier_name ASC;
sql2:
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    rg.r_name AS region_name,
    LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
    CONCAT(UPPER(p.p_comment), ' (Processed)') AS final_comment
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region rg ON n.n_regionkey = rg.r_regionkey
WHERE
    p.p_size > 10
    AND s.s_acctbal > 100.00
    AND ps.ps_supplycost = (
        SELECT MAX(ps2.ps_supplycost)
        FROM partsupp ps2
        JOIN supplier s2 ON ps2.ps_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
        WHERE ps2.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
          AND s2.s_acctbal > 100.00
    )
ORDER BY
    LENGTH(p.p_name) DESC,
    s.s_name ASC

sql1:
WITH SupplierParts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        ps.ps_availqty AS available_quantity,
        ps.ps_supplycost AS supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_suppkey ORDER BY ps.ps_availqty DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
TopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        supplier_name,
        part_name,
        available_quantity,
        supply_cost
    FROM 
        SupplierParts
    WHERE 
        rank <= 5
)
SELECT 
    ts.supplier_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ts.part_name) AS total_parts,
    SUM(ts.available_quantity) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ts.supply_cost) AS average_supply_cost
FROM 
    TopSuppliers ts
GROUP BY 
    ts.supplier_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT ts.part_name) > 1
ORDER BY 
    total_available_quantity DESC;
sql2:
SELECT
    supplier_name,
    total_parts,
    total_available_quantity,
    average_supply_cost
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_name) AS total_parts,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE
        ps.ps_availqty >= (
            SELECT ps2.ps_availqty
            FROM partsupp ps2
            WHERE ps2.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
            ORDER BY ps2.ps_availqty DESC
            LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4
        )
        OR (
            SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partsupp ps3 WHERE ps3.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
        ) <= 5
    GROUP BY
        s.s_name
) sub
WHERE
    total_parts > 1
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 20) AS short_comment,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(s.s_address, '[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]', '') AS cleaned_address,
    o.o_orderdate,
    (l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_price,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN 'Returned'
        ELSE 'Not Returned'
    END AS return_status
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    p.p_size > 10 
    AND s.s_acctbal > 1000 
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
ORDER BY 
    net_price DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size > 10
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_address
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 1000
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey, o_orderdate
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name,
    SUBSTRING(fp.p_comment, 1, 20) AS short_comment,
    fs.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(fs.s_address, '[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]', '') AS cleaned_address,
    fo.o_orderdate,
    (l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS net_price,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN 'Returned'
        ELSE 'Not Returned'
    END AS return_status
FROM 
    lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_parts fp ON l.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND l.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    INNER JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
ORDER BY 
    net_price DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH supplier_part_info AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_suppkey ORDER BY ps.ps_supplycost DESC) AS rn
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
),
top_suppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
    LIMIT 5
)
SELECT 
    tsi.s_suppkey,
    tsi.s_name,
    spi.p_name,
    spi.p_brand,
    spi.ps_availqty,
    spi.ps_supplycost
FROM supplier_part_info spi
JOIN top_suppliers tsi ON spi.s_suppkey = tsi.s_suppkey
WHERE spi.rn = 1
ORDER BY tsi.total_supply_cost DESC, spi.ps_supplycost ASC;
sql2:
SELECT
    tsi.s_suppkey,
    tsi.s_name,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_brand,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    ps.ps_supplycost
FROM partsupp ps
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN (
    SELECT
        s2.s_suppkey,
        s2.s_name,
        SUM(ps2.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s2
    JOIN partsupp ps2 ON s2.s_suppkey = ps2.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s2.s_suppkey, s2.s_name
    ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
    LIMIT 5
) tsi ON tsi.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps3
    WHERE ps3.ps_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
      AND ps3.ps_supplycost > ps.ps_supplycost
)
ORDER BY tsi.total_supply_cost DESC, ps.ps_supplycost ASC;

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        LEAST(LENGTH(p.p_name), LENGTH(p.p_brand), LENGTH(p.p_type)) AS min_length,
        GREATEST(LENGTH(p.p_name), LENGTH(p.p_brand), LENGTH(p.p_type)) AS max_length,
        (LENGTH(p.p_name) + LENGTH(p.p_brand) + LENGTH(p.p_type)) / 3.0 AS avg_length,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS price_rank
    FROM 
        part p
),
FilteredParts AS (
    SELECT 
        rp.p_partkey,
        rp.p_name,
        rp.p_brand,
        rp.p_type,
        rp.min_length,
        rp.max_length,
        rp.avg_length,
        rp.price_rank,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM 
        RankedParts rp
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON rp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        rp.min_length > 10
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_partkey,
    fp.p_name,
    fp.p_brand,
    fp.p_type,
    fp.min_length,
    fp.max_length,
    fp.avg_length,
    fp.price_rank,
    fp.supplier_name,
    fp.nation_name
FROM 
    FilteredParts fp
WHERE 
    fp.price_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    fp.avg_length DESC, fp.max_length ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sub.p_partkey,
    sub.p_name,
    sub.p_brand,
    sub.p_type,
    sub.min_length,
    sub.max_length,
    sub.avg_length,
    sub.price_rank,
    sub.supplier_name,
    sub.nation_name
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        LEAST(LENGTH(p.p_name), LENGTH(p.p_brand), LENGTH(p.p_type)) AS min_length,
        GREATEST(LENGTH(p.p_name), LENGTH(p.p_brand), LENGTH(p.p_type)) AS max_length,
        (LENGTH(p.p_name) + LENGTH(p.p_brand) + LENGTH(p.p_type)) / 3.0 AS avg_length,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS price_rank,
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE 
        LEAST(LENGTH(p.p_name), LENGTH(p.p_brand), LENGTH(p.p_type)) > 10
) sub
WHERE 
    sub.price_rank <= 10
ORDER BY 
    sub.avg_length DESC, sub.max_length ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(o.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_price,
    REGEXP_REPLACE(p.p_comment, '(\s+)', ' ') AS cleaned_comment,
    CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ' | Suppliers: ', COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey),
           ' | Total Quantity: ', SUM(l.l_quantity),
           ' | Avg Order Price: ', AVG(o.o_totalprice)) AS summary
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    p.p_retailprice > 50.00
AND 
    o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
AND 
    LENGTH(p.p_comment) > 10
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, cleaned_comment
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name,
           REGEXP_REPLACE(p_comment, '(\s+)', ' ') AS cleaned_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_retailprice > 50.00
      AND LENGTH(p_comment) > 10
),
open_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_quantity, o.o_totalprice
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
),
agg AS (
    SELECT fp.p_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
           SUM(ol.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
           AVG(ol.o_totalprice) AS avg_order_price,
           fp.cleaned_comment
    FROM filtered_parts fp
    JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN open_lineitems ol ON ps.ps_partkey = ol.l_partkey
    GROUP BY fp.p_name, fp.cleaned_comment
)
SELECT p_name,
       supplier_count,
       total_quantity,
       avg_order_price,
       cleaned_comment,
       CONCAT('Part: ', p_name, ' | Suppliers: ', supplier_count,
              ' | Total Quantity: ', total_quantity,
              ' | Avg Order Price: ', avg_order_price) AS summary
FROM agg
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    MIN(SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10)) AS short_comment,
    MAX(LENGTH(p.p_comment)) AS max_comment_length,
    AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS average_supplier_account_balance
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE 'Asia%'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    average_supplier_account_balance DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH asian_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_acctbal
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM nation n
        JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND r.r_name LIKE 'Asia%'
    )
),
part_agg AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT asup.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        MIN(SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10)) AS short_comment,
        MAX(LENGTH(p.p_comment)) AS max_comment_length,
        AVG(asup.s_acctbal) AS average_supplier_account_balance
    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN asian_suppliers asup ON ps.ps_suppkey = asup.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY p.p_name
)
SELECT p_name, supplier_count, short_comment, max_comment_length, average_supplier_account_balance
FROM part_agg
WHERE supplier_count > 5
ORDER BY average_supplier_account_balance DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_type, 
        p.p_brand, 
        p.p_container, 
        p.p_size, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        p.p_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS TypeRank
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_size > 10 AND p.p_retailprice < 100.00
), 
SelectedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_nationkey, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS PartCount
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) > 5
), 
CustomerOrderSummary AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS TotalOrders, 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS TotalSpent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000
)
SELECT 
    rp.p_name, 
    rp.p_container, 
    rp.p_retailprice, 
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name, 
    css.c_name AS customer_name, 
    css.TotalOrders, 
    css.TotalSpent
FROM RankedParts rp
JOIN SelectedSuppliers ss ON rp.p_partkey IN (SELECT ps.ps_partkey FROM partsupp ps WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey)
JOIN CustomerOrderSummary css ON css.TotalOrders > 10
ORDER BY rp.p_retailprice DESC, css.TotalSpent DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rp.p_name, 
    rp.p_container, 
    rp.p_retailprice, 
    ss.s_name AS supplier_name, 
    css.c_name AS customer_name, 
    css.TotalOrders, 
    css.TotalSpent
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_type, 
        p.p_brand, 
        p.p_container, 
        p.p_size, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        p.p_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS TypeRank
    FROM part p
    WHERE p.p_size > 10 AND p.p_retailprice < 100.00
) rp
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS TotalOrders, 
        SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS TotalSpent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000 AND COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 10
) css
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_nationkey, 
        s.s_acctbal,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS PartCount
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, s.s_acctbal
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) > 5
) ss ON EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM partsupp ps 
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = ss.s_suppkey AND ps.ps_partkey = rp.p_partkey
)
ORDER BY rp.p_retailprice DESC, css.TotalSpent DESC

sql1:
WITH StringMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
        UPPER(p.p_name) AS upper_name,
        LOWER(p.p_comment) AS lower_comment,
        CONCAT_WS('-', p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type) AS full_description,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(p.p_comment, '[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]', '') AS sanitized_comment
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_size > 10
), 
NationCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        n.n_nationkey, 
        n.n_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM 
        nation n
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    GROUP BY 
        n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
)
SELECT 
    sm.p_partkey, 
    sm.name_length, 
    sm.upper_name, 
    sm.lower_comment, 
    sm.full_description, 
    sm.sanitized_comment, 
    nc.n_name AS supplier_nation,
    nc.supplier_count
FROM 
    StringMetrics sm
JOIN 
    NationCounts nc ON sm.p_partkey % nc.supplier_count = 0
ORDER BY 
    sm.name_length DESC, nc.supplier_count ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sm.p_partkey, 
    sm.name_length, 
    sm.upper_name, 
    sm.lower_comment, 
    sm.full_description, 
    sm.sanitized_comment, 
    nc.n_name AS supplier_nation,
    nc.supplier_count
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey, 
            p.p_name, 
            LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
            UPPER(p.p_name) AS upper_name,
            LOWER(p.p_comment) AS lower_comment,
            CONCAT_WS('-', p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type) AS full_description,
            REGEXP_REPLACE(p.p_comment, '[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]', '') AS sanitized_comment
        FROM 
            part p
        WHERE 
            p.p_size > 10
    ) sm
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            n.n_nationkey, 
            n.n_name, 
            COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count
        FROM 
            nation n
        JOIN 
            supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
        GROUP BY 
            n.n_nationkey, n.n_name
    ) nc ON sm.p_partkey % nc.supplier_count = 0
ORDER BY 
    sm.name_length DESC, nc.supplier_count ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
    SUM(CASE 
            WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS total_revenue,
    CONCAT(r.r_name, ' - ', n.n_name) AS region_nation
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    p.p_comment LIKE '%special%'
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, r.r_name, n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC, customer_count DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_comment LIKE '%special%'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_partkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
),
supplier_region AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, CONCAT(r.r_name, ' - ', n.n_name) AS region_nation
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name AS part_name,
    sr.s_name AS supplier_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS customer_count,
    SUM(CASE 
            WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS total_revenue,
    sr.region_nation
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier_region sr ON ps.ps_suppkey = sr.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    filtered_lineitems fl ON fp.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
GROUP BY 
    fp.p_name, sr.s_name, sr.region_nation
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC, customer_count DESC;

sql1:
WITH CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count, SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer AS c
    JOIN orders AS o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
),
TopCustomers AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.order_count, c.total_spent
    FROM CustomerOrders AS c
    WHERE c.order_count > 5 AND c.total_spent > 5000
),
PartSuppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, s.s_name AS supplier_name
    FROM partsupp AS ps
    JOIN supplier AS s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT t.c_name, t.order_count, t.total_spent, p.p_name, p.p_brand, ps.supplier_name
FROM TopCustomers AS t
JOIN lineitem AS l ON t.c_custkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN PartSuppliers AS ps ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN part AS p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
WHERE p.p_brand LIKE 'Brand%'
ORDER BY t.total_spent DESC, t.order_count DESC;
sql2:
SELECT co.c_name,
       co.order_count,
       co.total_spent,
       p.p_name,
       p.p_brand,
       s.s_name AS supplier_name
FROM (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name,
           COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
           SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer AS c
    JOIN orders AS o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 5 AND SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 5000
) AS co
JOIN lineitem AS l ON co.c_custkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN part AS p ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN partsupp AS ps ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN supplier AS s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE p.p_brand LIKE 'Brand%'
ORDER BY co.total_spent DESC, co.order_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name, 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name, 
    c.c_name AS customer_name, 
    o.o_orderdate AS order_date, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    CONCAT('Region: ', r.r_name, '; Nation: ', n.n_name) AS geographical_info,
    LEFT(p.p_comment, 25) AS part_comment_snippet
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
    AND l.l_returnflag = 'N'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, c.c_name, o.o_orderdate, r.r_name, n.n_name, p.p_comment
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
