    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey,
           l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_returnflag = 'N'
),
supplier_geo AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey,
           CONCAT('Region: ', r.r_name, '; Nation: ', n.n_name) AS geographical_info
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    sg.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    fo.o_orderdate AS order_date,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    sg.geographical_info,
    LEFT(p.p_comment, 25) AS part_comment_snippet
FROM 
    filtered_lineitems fl
JOIN filtered_orders fo ON fl.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN part p ON fl.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND fl.l_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN supplier_geo sg ON ps.ps_suppkey = sg.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, sg.s_name, c.c_name, fo.o_orderdate, sg.geographical_info, p.p_comment
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
    CONCAT('Brand: ', p.p_brand, ', Type: ', p.p_type) AS product_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    MAX(CASE WHEN s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey THEN s.s_name ELSE NULL END) AS prominent_supplier
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    LENGTH(p.p_name) > 5
    AND p.p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) FROM part p2)
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_comment
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, average_supply_cost ASC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH avg_price AS (
    SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) AS avg_rp FROM part p2
),
filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_brand, p_type, p_comment
    FROM part, avg_price
    WHERE LENGTH(p_name) > 5
      AND p_retailprice > avg_price.avg_rp
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name,
    SUBSTR(fp.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
    CONCAT('Brand: ', fp.p_brand, ', Type: ', fp.p_type) AS product_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    MAX(s.s_name) AS prominent_supplier
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    fp.p_name, fp.p_brand, fp.p_type, fp.p_comment
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, average_supply_cost ASC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_address,
        n.n_name AS supplier_nation,
        TRIM(UPPER(SUBSTRING(s.s_comment, 1, 20))) AS comment_snippet,
        LENGTH(s.s_comment) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s.s_comment, ' ', '')) AS word_count
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
),
PartStatistics AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_type,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supplycost,
        COUNT(*) AS supply_count
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_type
)
SELECT 
    sd.s_name,
    sd.supplier_nation,
    ps.p_name,
    ps.average_supplycost,
    ps.supply_count,
    sd.word_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN sd.word_count > 5 THEN 'Long Comment'
        ELSE 'Short Comment'
    END AS comment_length_category
FROM 
    SupplierDetails sd
JOIN 
    PartStatistics ps ON sd.s_suppkey = ps.p_partkey
WHERE 
    sd.comment_snippet LIKE '%REQUIRED%'
ORDER BY 
    ps.average_supplycost DESC, sd.s_name ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    s.s_name,
    n.n_name AS supplier_nation,
    p.p_name,
    ps_agg.average_supplycost,
    ps_agg.supply_count,
    LENGTH(s.s_comment) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s.s_comment, ' ', '')) AS word_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN LENGTH(s.s_comment) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s.s_comment, ' ', '')) > 5 THEN 'Long Comment'
        ELSE 'Short Comment'
    END AS comment_length_category
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        ps.ps_partkey,
        AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supplycost,
        COUNT(*) AS supply_count
     FROM 
        partsupp ps
     GROUP BY 
        ps.ps_partkey) ps_agg ON s.s_suppkey = ps_agg.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    part p ON p.p_partkey = ps_agg.ps_partkey
WHERE 
    TRIM(UPPER(SUBSTRING(s.s_comment, 1, 20))) LIKE '%REQUIRED%'
ORDER BY 
    ps_agg.average_supplycost DESC, s.s_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ' supplies part: ', p.p_name, 
           ' with a retail price of: ', CAST(p.p_retailprice AS DECIMAL(10, 2)), 
           '. Comments: ', p.p_comment) AS full_description,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts_supplied,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
    MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS last_ship_date
FROM
    supplier s
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
LEFT JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
WHERE
    s.s_comment LIKE '%quality%' AND 
    p.p_type LIKE '%metal%'
GROUP BY
    s.s_name, p.p_name, p.p_comment, p.p_retailprice
HAVING 
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) > 0
ORDER BY 
    total_available_quantity DESC, last_ship_date DESC;
sql2:
WITH base_agg AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ' supplies part: ', p.p_name,
               ' with a retail price of: ', CAST(p.p_retailprice AS DECIMAL(10, 2)),
               '. Comments: ', p.p_comment) AS full_description,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS total_parts_supplied,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
        MAX(l.l_shipdate) AS last_ship_date
    FROM
        (SELECT s_suppkey, s_name FROM supplier WHERE s_comment LIKE '%quality%') s
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        (SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_retailprice, p_comment FROM part WHERE p_type LIKE '%metal%') p
        ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    LEFT JOIN
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    GROUP BY
        s.s_name, p.p_name, p.p_comment, p.p_retailprice
)
SELECT *
FROM base_agg
WHERE total_available_quantity > 0
ORDER BY total_available_quantity DESC, last_ship_date DESC;

sql1:
WITH ProcessedParts AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_retailprice,
        UPPER(p.p_comment) AS upper_comment,
        SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS truncated_comment
    FROM
        part p
    WHERE
        p.p_retailprice > (
            SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice)
            FROM part p2
        )
),
SupplierInfo AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_nationkey,
        n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE
        n.n_name LIKE 'A%'
),
OrderSummary AS (
    SELECT
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_custkey,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS item_count,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM
        orders o
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey
)
SELECT
    pp.p_partkey,
    pp.p_name,
    pp.p_brand,
    pp.upper_comment,
    si.s_name,
    os.item_count,
    os.total_sales
FROM
    ProcessedParts pp
JOIN
    SupplierInfo si ON pp.p_partkey % 10 = si.s_suppkey % 10
JOIN
    OrderSummary os ON pp.p_partkey = os.o_custkey % 100 
WHERE
    pp.truncated_comment <> ''
ORDER BY
    os.total_sales DESC, pp.p_retailprice ASC;
sql2:
SELECT
    pp.p_partkey,
    pp.p_name,
    pp.p_brand,
    pp.upper_comment,
    si.s_name,
    os.item_count,
    os.total_sales
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_retailprice,
            UPPER(p.p_comment) AS upper_comment,
            SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS truncated_comment
        FROM
            part p
        WHERE
            p.p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p2.p_retailprice) FROM part p2)
    ) pp
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            s.s_suppkey,
            s.s_name,
            s.s_nationkey
        FROM
            supplier s
        WHERE
            EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM nation n
                WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
                  AND n.n_name LIKE 'A%'
            )
    ) si ON pp.p_partkey % 10 = si.s_suppkey % 10
JOIN
    (
        SELECT
            l.l_orderkey AS o_orderkey,
            o.o_custkey,
            COUNT(*) AS item_count,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
        FROM
            lineitem l
        JOIN
            orders o ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY
            l.l_orderkey, o.o_custkey
    ) os ON pp.p_partkey = os.o_custkey % 100
WHERE
    pp.truncated_comment <> ''
ORDER BY
    os.total_sales DESC, pp.p_retailprice ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', S.s_name, ' | Part: ', P.p_name, ' | Price: ', PS.ps_supplycost, 
           ' | Region: ', R.r_name, ' | Nationality: ', N.n_name) AS full_description
FROM 
    supplier S
JOIN 
    partsupp PS ON S.s_suppkey = PS.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part P ON PS.ps_partkey = P.p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation N ON S.s_nationkey = N.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region R ON N.n_regionkey = R.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    P.p_retailprice > (
        SELECT AVG(p_retailprice) 
        FROM part
    )
AND 
    S.s_acctbal BETWEEN 1000.00 AND 5000.00
ORDER BY 
    P.p_name ASC, S.s_name DESC;
sql2:
WITH avg_price AS (
    SELECT AVG(p_retailprice) AS avg_rp FROM part
)
SELECT 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', S.s_name, ' | Part: ', P.p_name, ' | Price: ', PS.ps_supplycost, 
           ' | Region: ', R.r_name, ' | Nationality: ', N.n_name) AS full_description
FROM 
    part P
CROSS JOIN 
    avg_price AP
JOIN 
    partsupp PS ON PS.ps_partkey = P.p_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier S ON S.s_suppkey = PS.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation N ON S.s_nationkey = N.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region R ON N.n_regionkey = R.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    P.p_retailprice > AP.avg_rp
AND 
    S.s_acctbal >= 1000.00
AND 
    S.s_acctbal <= 5000.00
ORDER BY 
    P.p_name ASC, S.s_name DESC;

sql1:
WITH String_Analysis AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
        UPPER(p.p_name) AS name_upper,
        LOWER(p.p_name) AS name_lower,
        REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'NEW', 'OLD') AS modified_comment,
        SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS comment_excerpt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM 
        part p
    LEFT JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_name, p.p_comment
)
SELECT 
    part_name,
    name_length,
    name_upper,
    name_lower,
    modified_comment,
    comment_excerpt,
    supplier_count,
    order_count
FROM 
    String_Analysis
WHERE 
    name_length > 10
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, order_count ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
    UPPER(p.p_name) AS name_upper,
    LOWER(p.p_name) AS name_lower,
    REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'NEW', 'OLD') AS modified_comment,
    SUBSTR(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS comment_excerpt,
    COALESCE(sc.supplier_count, 0) AS supplier_count,
    COALESCE(oc.order_count, 0) AS order_count
FROM 
    part p
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count
    FROM partsupp ps
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey
) sc ON p.p_partkey = sc.ps_partkey
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_orderkey) AS order_count
    FROM lineitem l
    INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
) oc ON p.p_partkey = oc.l_partkey
WHERE 
    LENGTH(p.p_name) > 10
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, order_count ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    CONCAT(LEFT(p.p_name, 3), '-', RIGHT(p.p_name, 3), ' (', p.p_size, ')') AS formatted_name,
    s.s_name,
    c.c_name,
    l.l_orderkey,
    SUBSTR(l.l_comment, 1, 20) AS short_comment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_linenumber) AS line_item_count
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    LENGTH(p.p_name) > 10 AND 
    s.s_acctbal > 1000.00 AND 
    l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, formatted_name, s.s_name, c.c_name, l.l_orderkey, short_comment
ORDER BY 
    line_item_count DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_size
    FROM part
    WHERE LENGTH(p_name) > 10
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 1000.00
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_partkey, l_suppkey, l_linenumber, l_comment
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name,
    CONCAT(LEFT(fp.p_name, 3), '-', RIGHT(fp.p_name, 3), ' (', fp.p_size, ')') AS formatted_name,
    fs.s_name,
    c.c_name,
    fl.l_orderkey,
    SUBSTR(fl.l_comment, 1, 20) AS short_comment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fl.l_linenumber) AS line_item_count
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    filtered_lineitems fl ON fp.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
GROUP BY 
    fp.p_name, formatted_name, fs.s_name, c.c_name, fl.l_orderkey, short_comment
ORDER BY 
    line_item_count DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, r.r_regionkey, r.r_name
),
FilteredTopSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        r.r_name,
        rs.part_count,
        rs.total_supply_cost
    FROM 
        RankedSuppliers rs
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON rs.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        rs.rank <= 5
)
SELECT 
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    c.c_acctbal AS customer_balance,
    fts.s_name AS supplier_name,
    fts.part_count AS number_of_parts,
    fts.total_supply_cost AS total_cost_from_supplier
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    FilteredTopSuppliers fts ON l.l_suppkey = fts.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
ORDER BY 
    fts.total_supply_cost DESC, c.c_name ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    c.c_acctbal AS customer_balance,
    fts.s_name AS supplier_name,
    fts.part_count AS number_of_parts,
    fts.total_supply_cost AS total_cost_from_supplier
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            s2.s_suppkey,
            s2.s_name,
            r2.r_name,
            base.part_count,
            base.total_supply_cost
        FROM 
            (
                SELECT 
                    s.s_suppkey,
                    r.r_regionkey,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_partkey) AS part_count,
                    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.r_regionkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) DESC) AS rnk
                FROM 
                    supplier s
                JOIN 
                    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
                JOIN 
                    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
                JOIN 
                    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
                GROUP BY 
                    s.s_suppkey, r.r_regionkey
            ) base
        JOIN 
            supplier s2 ON base.s_suppkey = s2.s_suppkey
        JOIN 
            nation n2 ON s2.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
        JOIN 
            region r2 ON n2.n_regionkey = r2.r_regionkey
        WHERE 
            base.rnk <= 5
    ) fts ON l.l_suppkey = fts.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate <= '1997-12-31'
ORDER BY 
    fts.total_supply_cost DESC, c.c_name ASC

sql1:
SELECT 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
    AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity_per_order,
    SUBSTRING(s.s_comment, 1, 25) AS short_comment,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_brand LIKE 'Brand#%'
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, p.p_name, r.r_name, s.s_comment
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 10000
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC, avg_quantity_per_order ASC;
sql2:
WITH sales_data AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        p.p_name AS part_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_quantity_per_order,
        SUBSTRING(s.s_comment, 1, 25) AS short_comment,
        r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_brand LIKE 'Brand#%'
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_name, p.p_name, r.r_name, s.s_comment
)
SELECT 
    supplier_name,
    part_name,
    total_orders,
    total_sales,
    avg_quantity_per_order,
    short_comment,
    region_name
FROM 
    sales_data
WHERE 
    total_sales > 10000
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC, avg_quantity_per_order ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) ELSE NULL END) AS avg_returned_price,
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Product: ', p.p_name) AS supplier_product_info,
    REPLACE(l.l_comment, 'quality', 'excellence') AS modified_comment
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%widget%' 
    AND s.s_comment NOT LIKE '%urgent%'
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, l.l_comment
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 10000
ORDER BY 
    order_count DESC, total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
),
filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE '%widget%'
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_comment NOT LIKE '%urgent%'
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        fp.p_name,
        fs.s_name,
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS net_price,
        l.l_returnflag,
        l.l_comment
    FROM filtered_parts fp
    JOIN lineitem l ON fp.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        p_name,
        s_name,
        l_comment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l_orderkey) AS order_count,
        SUM(net_price) AS total_revenue,
        AVG(CASE WHEN l_returnflag = 'R' THEN net_price ELSE NULL END) AS avg_returned_price,
        CONCAT('Supplier: ', s_name, ', Product: ', p_name) AS supplier_product_info,
        REPLACE(l_comment, 'quality', 'excellence') AS modified_comment
    FROM base
    GROUP BY p_name, s_name, l_comment
)
SELECT
    p_name,
    s_name,
    order_count,
    total_revenue,
    avg_returned_price,
    supplier_product_info,
    modified_comment
FROM aggregated
WHERE total_revenue > 10000
ORDER BY order_count DESC, total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
WITH SupplierInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_address,
        n.n_name AS nation_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        s.s_acctbal,
        s.s_comment,
        CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS full_info
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
PartDetails AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        p.p_size,
        p.p_container,
        p.p_retailprice,
        TRIM(p.p_comment) AS trimmed_comment,
        LENGTH(p.p_comment) AS comment_length
    FROM 
        part p
),
OrderSummaries AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderstatus,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS distinct_parts_sold
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus
)
SELECT 
    si.full_info,
    pd.p_name,
    pd.p_brand,
    pd.p_type,
    pd.p_size,
    pd.p_container,
    pd.p_retailprice,
    osv.total_revenue,
    osv.distinct_parts_sold,
    pd.comment_length,
    si.s_comment
FROM 
    SupplierInfo si
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON si.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    PartDetails pd ON ps.ps_partkey = pd.p_partkey
JOIN 
    OrderSummaries osv ON pd.p_partkey = osv.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    pd.trimmed_comment LIKE '%high%quality%'
ORDER BY 
    osv.total_revenue DESC, 
    pd.comment_length DESC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS full_info,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size,
    p.p_container,
    p.p_retailprice,
    osv.total_revenue,
    osv.distinct_parts_sold,
    LENGTH(p.p_comment) AS comment_length,
    s.s_comment
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderstatus,
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
            COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_partkey) AS distinct_parts_sold
        FROM 
            orders o
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY 
            o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderstatus
    ) osv ON p.p_partkey = osv.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    TRIM(p.p_comment) LIKE '%high%quality%'
ORDER BY 
    osv.total_revenue DESC, 
    LENGTH(p.p_comment) DESC;

sql1:
WITH FilteredParts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, 
           p_name, 
           p_mfgr, 
           p_size, 
           p_retailprice, 
           p_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_size > 20 AND 
          (p_comment LIKE '%green%' OR p_comment LIKE '%metallic%')
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, 
           s.s_name, 
           s.s_nationkey, 
           s.s_acctbal,
           SUBSTRING(s.s_address, 1, 20) AS short_address
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE s.s_acctbal > 5000 
),
CustomerPurchase AS (
    SELECT c.c_custkey, 
           c.c_name, 
           COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders, 
           SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
)
SELECT fp.p_name, 
       fp.p_retailprice, 
       CONCAT(sd.s_name, ' (', sd.short_address, ')') AS supplier_info, 
       cp.c_name AS customer_name, 
       cp.total_orders, 
       cp.total_spent
FROM FilteredParts fp
JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN SupplierDetails sd ON ps.ps_suppkey = sd.s_suppkey
JOIN CustomerPurchase cp ON cp.total_orders > 0
WHERE cp.total_spent > 10000
ORDER BY fp.p_retailprice DESC, cp.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
SELECT p.p_name,
       p.p_retailprice,
       CONCAT(s.s_name, ' (', SUBSTRING(s.s_address, 1, 20), ')') AS supplier_info,
       cp.c_name AS customer_name,
       cp.total_orders,
       cp.total_spent
FROM part p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT c.c_custkey,
           c.c_name,
           COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
           SUM(o.o_totalprice) AS total_spent
    FROM customer c
    JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name
    HAVING COUNT(o.o_orderkey) > 0
       AND SUM(o.o_totalprice) > 10000
) cp
WHERE p.p_size > 20
  AND (p.p_comment LIKE '%green%' OR p.p_comment LIKE '%metallic%')
  AND s.s_acctbal > 5000
ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC, cp.total_spent DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT_WS(' | ', p.p_name, s.s_name, c.c_name) AS Product_Supplier_Customer,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS Total_Revenue,
    AVG(l.l_quantity) AS Average_Quantity,
    MAX(l.l_tax) AS Max_Tax,
    MIN(p.p_retailprice) AS Min_Retail_Price
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
WHERE 
    c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' 
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, c.c_name
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 10000
ORDER BY 
    Total_Revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name,
        c.c_name,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_tax,
        p.p_retailprice
    FROM
        part p
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE
        c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
        AND l.l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate <= '1996-12-31'
),
agg AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT_WS(' | ', p_name, s_name, c_name) AS Product_Supplier_Customer,
        SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS Total_Revenue,
        AVG(l_quantity) AS Average_Quantity,
        MAX(l_tax) AS Max_Tax,
        MIN(p_retailprice) AS Min_Retail_Price
    FROM
        base
    GROUP BY
        p_name, s_name, c_name
)
SELECT
    Product_Supplier_Customer,
    Total_Revenue,
    Average_Quantity,
    Max_Tax,
    Min_Retail_Price
FROM
    agg
WHERE
    Total_Revenue > 10000
ORDER BY
    Total_Revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    p.p_brand, 
    p.p_type, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales, 
    r.r_name AS region_name, 
    n.n_name AS nation_name
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_comment LIKE '%%special%%' 
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_type, r.r_name, n.n_name
HAVING 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) > 100
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC;
sql2:
WITH agg AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        n.n_name AS nation_name
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        part p ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    JOIN
        supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN
        nation n ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN
        region r ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    WHERE
        l.l_shipdate >= '1995-01-01'
        AND l.l_shipdate <= '1997-12-31'
        AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM part p2 WHERE p2.p_partkey = p.p_partkey AND p2.p_comment LIKE '%%special%%')
    GROUP BY
        p.p_name, p.p_brand, p.p_type, r.r_name, n.n_name
)
SELECT
    p_name,
    p_brand,
    p_type,
    total_quantity,
    total_sales,
    region_name,
    nation_name
FROM
    agg
WHERE
    total_quantity > 100
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    c.c_name,
    r.r_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_balance,
    MAX(DATE_PART('year', o.o_orderdate)) AS latest_order_year
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE '%Europe%'
    AND o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, c.c_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH european_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_acctbal, r.r_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name LIKE '%Europe%'
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_custkey, o.o_orderdate
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.o_orderstatus = 'O'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    es.s_name,
    c.c_name,
    es.r_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fo.o_orderkey) AS order_count,
    AVG(es.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_balance,
    MAX(DATE_PART('year', fo.o_orderdate)) AS latest_order_year
FROM
    filtered_lineitems fl
JOIN part p ON fl.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN filtered_orders fo ON fl.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN european_suppliers es ON ps.ps_suppkey = es.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, es.s_name, c.c_name, es.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    MAX(p.p_retailprice) AS max_retail_price,
    MIN(LENGTH(p.p_comment)) AS min_comment_length,
    UPPER(SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10)) AS comment_prefix,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS supplier_info
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE
    p.p_name LIKE '%widget%'
    AND ps.ps_availqty > 0
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, r.r_name, n.n_name, p.p_retailprice, p.p_comment, s.s_name, s.s_address
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC, average_supply_cost ASC;
sql2:
WITH supplier_region AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_address,
        n.n_name,
        r.r_name
    FROM
        supplier s,
        nation n,
        region r
    WHERE
        s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        AND n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
filtered_partsupp AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    WHERE
        ps.ps_availqty > 0
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    SUM(fps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(fps.ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost,
    MAX(p.p_retailprice) AS max_retail_price,
    MIN(LENGTH(p.p_comment)) AS min_comment_length,
    UPPER(SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10)) AS comment_prefix,
    sr.r_name AS region_name,
    sr.n_name AS nation_name,
    CONCAT(sr.s_name, ' - ', sr.s_address) AS supplier_info
FROM
    part p
INNER JOIN
    filtered_partsupp fps ON p.p_partkey = fps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN
    supplier_region sr ON fps.ps_suppkey = sr.s_suppkey
WHERE
    p.p_name LIKE '%widget%'
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, sr.r_name, sr.n_name, p.p_retailprice, p.p_comment, sr.s_name, sr.s_address
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC, average_supply_cost ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(l.l_quantity) > 100 THEN 'High Demand'
        WHEN SUM(l.l_quantity) BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN 'Medium Demand'
        ELSE 'Low Demand' 
    END AS demand_category,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    CONCAT('Supplier ', s.s_name, ' provided ', SUM(l.l_quantity), ' of ', p.p_name) AS detailed_comment
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name, c.c_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC, part_name ASC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_quantity,
           l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-12-31'
),
base_data AS (
    SELECT p.p_name,
           s.s_name,
           c.c_name,
           r.r_name,
           fl.l_quantity,
           fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM filtered_lineitems fl
    INNER JOIN part p ON fl.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON fl.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    INNER JOIN orders o ON fl.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT p_name,
           s_name,
           c_name,
           r_name,
           SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
           SUM(line_revenue) AS revenue
    FROM base_data
    GROUP BY p_name, s_name, c_name, r_name
)
SELECT
    p_name AS part_name,
    s_name AS supplier_name,
    c_name AS customer_name,
    total_quantity,
    revenue,
    CASE
        WHEN total_quantity > 100 THEN 'High Demand'
        WHEN total_quantity BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN 'Medium Demand'
        ELSE 'Low Demand'
    END AS demand_category,
    r_name AS region_name,
    CONCAT('Supplier ', s_name, ' provided ', total_quantity, ' of ', p_name) AS detailed_comment
FROM aggregated
ORDER BY revenue DESC, part_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price, 
    CONCAT('Total Quantity: ', CAST(SUM(l.l_quantity) AS CHAR), 
           ', Avg Price: ', CAST(AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS DECIMAL(10, 2))) AS summary,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    n.n_name AS nation_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON c.c_custkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%widget%'
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, r.r_name, n.n_name, s.s_name, c.c_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_price ASC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE '%widget%'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_orderkey, l_quantity, l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
),
supplier_region AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, n.n_name, r.r_name
    FROM supplier s
    INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name, 
    SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(fl.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price, 
    CONCAT('Total Quantity: ', CAST(SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS CHAR), 
           ', Avg Price: ', CAST(AVG(fl.l_extendedprice) AS DECIMAL(10, 2))) AS summary,
    sr.r_name AS region_name,
    sr.n_name AS nation_name,
    sr.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
INNER JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON fp.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN supplier_region sr ON ps.ps_suppkey = sr.s_suppkey
INNER JOIN customer c ON c.c_custkey = fl.l_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    fp.p_name, sr.r_name, sr.n_name, sr.s_name, c.c_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_price ASC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
    AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_acctbal,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_ordered,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%steel%'
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, r.r_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_suppkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_comment,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_count,
        AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_acctbal,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity_ordered,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        part p
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_name LIKE '%steel%'
        AND o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01'
        AND o.o_orderdate <= '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_comment, r.r_name
)
SELECT 
    p_name,
    supplier_count,
    avg_supplier_acctbal,
    total_quantity_ordered,
    total_revenue,
    SUBSTRING(p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
    region_name
FROM 
    base
WHERE 
    supplier_count > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'O' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS total_sales_open_orders,
    SUM(CASE WHEN l.l_discount > 0 THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) ELSE l.l_extendedprice END) AS total_sales_after_discount,
    AVG(extract(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate)) AS avg_order_year
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, r.r_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) > 10
ORDER BY 
    total_sales_open_orders DESC, supplier_name ASC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH supplier_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_name AS supplier_name,
        r.r_name AS region_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
        SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'O' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS total_sales_open_orders,
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.l_discount > 0 THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) ELSE l.l_extendedprice END) AS total_sales_after_discount,
        AVG(extract(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate)) AS avg_order_year
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    JOIN 
        orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    JOIN 
        customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    JOIN 
        supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY 
        s.s_name, r.r_name
)
SELECT 
    supplier_name,
    region_name,
    total_customers,
    total_sales_open_orders,
    total_sales_after_discount,
    avg_order_year
FROM 
    supplier_stats
WHERE 
    total_customers > 10
ORDER BY 
    total_sales_open_orders DESC, supplier_name ASC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
SELECT 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 100000 THEN 'High Revenue'
        WHEN SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) BETWEEN 50000 AND 100000 THEN 'Medium Revenue'
        ELSE 'Low Revenue'
    END AS revenue_category
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC, supplier_name ASC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supplier_region AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_orderkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1997-01-01' AND DATE '1997-12-31'
),
order_customers AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, c.c_custkey
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
)
SELECT
    sr.s_name AS supplier_name,
    SUM(fl.revenue) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT oc.c_custkey) AS total_customers,
    sr.region_name AS region_name,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(fl.revenue) > 100000 THEN 'High Revenue'
        WHEN SUM(fl.revenue) BETWEEN 50000 AND 100000 THEN 'Medium Revenue'
        ELSE 'Low Revenue'
    END AS revenue_category
FROM
    supplier_region sr
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON sr.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN
    filtered_lineitem fl ON ps.ps_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN
    order_customers oc ON fl.l_orderkey = oc.o_orderkey
GROUP BY
    sr.s_name, sr.region_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC, supplier_name ASC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_acctbal, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn,
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_container
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 20 
        AND s.s_comment LIKE '%reliable%'
), FilteredOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey,
        o.o_orderdate,
        o.o_totalprice,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY o.o_totalprice DESC) AS order_rank
    FROM 
        orders o
    WHERE 
        o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
        AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
)
SELECT 
    fs.s_name, 
    fs.p_name, 
    fs.p_container, 
    fo.o_orderkey, 
    fo.o_orderdate, 
    fo.o_totalprice
FROM 
    RankedSuppliers fs
JOIN 
    FilteredOrders fo ON fs.rn = 1
ORDER BY 
    fo.o_totalprice DESC, 
    fs.p_name ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    fs.s_name, 
    fs.p_name, 
    fs.p_container, 
    fo.o_orderkey, 
    fo.o_orderdate, 
    fo.o_totalprice
FROM 
    (
        SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_acctbal, p_name, p_container
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                s.s_suppkey, 
                s.s_name, 
                s.s_acctbal, 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_partkey ORDER BY s.s_acctbal DESC) AS rn,
                p.p_name, 
                p.p_container
            FROM 
                supplier s
            JOIN 
                partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
            JOIN 
                part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
            WHERE 
                p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 20 
                AND s.s_comment LIKE '%reliable%'
        ) ranked
        WHERE ranked.rn = 1
    ) fs
CROSS JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            o.o_orderkey,
            o.o_orderdate,
            o.o_totalprice
        FROM 
            orders o
        WHERE 
            o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
            AND o.o_orderstatus = 'F'
    ) fo
ORDER BY 
    fo.o_totalprice DESC, 
    fs.p_name ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s_name, ' | Part: ', p_name, ' | Type: ', p_type, ' | Size: ', p_size, ' | Comment: ', p_comment) AS item_details,
    REPLACE(r_name, 'Region', 'Area') AS modified_region_name,
    LENGTH(p_comment) AS comment_length,
    TRIM(LEADING 'A' FROM s_comment) AS modified_supplier_comment
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p_retailprice > (SELECT AVG(p_retailprice) FROM part)
ORDER BY 
    comment_length DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH avg_price AS (
    SELECT AVG(p_retailprice) AS avg_rp FROM part
),
qualified_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_type, p_size, p_comment, p_retailprice
    FROM part, avg_price
    WHERE p_retailprice > avg_rp
)
SELECT 
    CONCAT('Supplier: ', s_name, ' | Part: ', qp.p_name, ' | Type: ', qp.p_type, ' | Size: ', qp.p_size, ' | Comment: ', qp.p_comment) AS item_details,
    REPLACE(r_name, 'Region', 'Area') AS modified_region_name,
    LENGTH(qp.p_comment) AS comment_length,
    TRIM(LEADING 'A' FROM s_comment) AS modified_supplier_comment
FROM 
    qualified_parts qp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON qp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
ORDER BY 
    comment_length DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH StringMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
        UPPER(p.p_mfgr) AS mfgr_upper,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS comment_excerpt,
        REPLACE(p.p_name, ' ', '_') AS name_with_underscores,
        CONCAT('Type: ', p.p_type, ' | Size: ', p.p_size) AS type_size_info,
        LENGTH(REPLACE(p.p_comment, ' ', '')) AS comment_char_count
    FROM 
        part p
),
SupplierMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS supplier_info,
        LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS comment_length,
        POSITION('reliable' IN s.s_comment) AS reliable_position
    FROM 
        supplier s
)
SELECT 
    sm.p_partkey,
    sm.name_length,
    sm.mfgr_upper,
    sm.comment_excerpt,
    sm.name_with_underscores,
    sm.type_size_info,
    sm.comment_char_count,
    su.s_suppkey,
    su.supplier_info,
    su.comment_length,
    su.reliable_position
FROM 
    StringMetrics sm
JOIN 
    SupplierMetrics su ON sm.name_length < su.comment_length
WHERE 
    sm.comment_char_count > 50
ORDER BY 
    sm.name_length DESC, su.comment_length ASC;
sql2:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
    UPPER(p.p_mfgr) AS mfgr_upper,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS comment_excerpt,
    REPLACE(p.p_name, ' ', '_') AS name_with_underscores,
    CONCAT('Type: ', p.p_type, ' | Size: ', p.p_size) AS type_size_info,
    LENGTH(REPLACE(p.p_comment, ' ', '')) AS comment_char_count,
    s.s_suppkey,
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS supplier_info,
    LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS comment_length,
    POSITION('reliable' IN s.s_comment) AS reliable_position
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    supplier s ON LENGTH(p.p_name) < LENGTH(s.s_comment)
WHERE 
    LENGTH(REPLACE(p.p_comment, ' ', '')) > 50
ORDER BY 
    name_length DESC, comment_length ASC;

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        p.p_name, 
        p.p_mfgr, 
        p.p_size, 
        p.p_container, 
        p.p_retailprice, 
        p.p_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_mfgr ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rn
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        p.p_size > 10 AND 
        p.p_retailprice < 100.00
),
SupplierPart AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        s.s_name, 
        s.s_phone, 
        ps.ps_supplycost, 
        pp.p_name
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN 
        RankedParts pp ON ps.ps_partkey = pp.p_partkey
    WHERE 
        pp.rn <= 5
),
CustomerOrders AS (
    SELECT 
        c.c_custkey, 
        c.c_name, 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        o.o_orderdate, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_spent
    FROM 
        customer c
    JOIN 
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        c.c_custkey, c.c_name, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
)
SELECT 
    sp.s_name AS supplier_name,
    sp.p_name AS part_name,
    co.c_name AS customer_name,
    co.total_spent,
    COALESCE(SUM(co.total_spent), 0) AS total_spent_sum
FROM 
    SupplierPart sp
JOIN 
    CustomerOrders co ON sp.p_name LIKE '%' || COALESCE(SUBSTRING(CAST(co.total_spent AS VARCHAR), 1, 3), '') || '%'
GROUP BY 
    sp.s_name, sp.p_name, co.c_name, co.total_spent
ORDER BY 
    total_spent_sum DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sp.s_name AS supplier_name,
    sp.p_name AS part_name,
    co.c_name AS customer_name,
    co.total_spent,
    COALESCE(SUM(co.total_spent), 0) AS total_spent_sum
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            s.s_suppkey, 
            s.s_name, 
            s.s_phone, 
            ps.ps_supplycost, 
            pp.p_name
        FROM 
            supplier s
        JOIN 
            partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN 
            (
                SELECT 
                    p.p_partkey, 
                    p.p_name, 
                    p.p_mfgr, 
                    p.p_size, 
                    p.p_container, 
                    p.p_retailprice, 
                    p.p_comment,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_mfgr ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) AS rn
                FROM 
                    part p
                WHERE 
                    p.p_size > 10 AND 
                    p.p_retailprice < 100.00
            ) pp ON ps.ps_partkey = pp.p_partkey
        WHERE 
            pp.rn <= 5
    ) sp
JOIN 
    (
        SELECT 
            c.c_custkey, 
            c.c_name, 
            o.o_orderkey, 
            o.o_orderdate, 
            SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_spent
        FROM 
            customer c
        JOIN 
            orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
        JOIN 
            lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
        GROUP BY 
            c.c_custkey, c.c_name, o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate
    ) co ON sp.p_name LIKE '%' || COALESCE(SUBSTRING(CAST(co.total_spent AS VARCHAR), 1, 3), '') || '%'
GROUP BY 
    sp.s_name, sp.p_name, co.c_name, co.total_spent
ORDER BY 
    total_spent_sum DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(c.c_name, ' from ', s.s_name, ' in ', n.n_name) AS supplier_customer_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(l.l_quantity) AS average_quantity_per_order,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) > 10000 THEN 'High Revenue'
        WHEN SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) BETWEEN 5000 AND 10000 THEN 'Medium Revenue'
        ELSE 'Low Revenue' 
    END AS revenue_category
FROM 
    customer c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    c.c_acctbal > 10000 
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    c.c_name, s.s_name, n.n_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        c.c_name,
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name,
        o.o_orderkey,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS net_revenue,
        l.l_quantity
    FROM
        customer c
    JOIN
        orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
    JOIN
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE
        c.c_acctbal > 10000
        AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
),
agg AS (
    SELECT
        c_name,
        s_name,
        n_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(net_revenue) AS total_revenue,
        AVG(l_quantity) AS average_quantity_per_order
    FROM
        base
    GROUP BY
        c_name, s_name, n_name
)
SELECT
    CONCAT(a.c_name, ' from ', a.s_name, ' in ', a.n_name) AS supplier_customer_info,
    a.total_orders,
    a.total_revenue,
    a.average_quantity_per_order,
    CASE
        WHEN a.total_revenue > 10000 THEN 'High Revenue'
        WHEN a.total_revenue BETWEEN 5000 AND 10000 THEN 'Medium Revenue'
        ELSE 'Low Revenue'
    END AS revenue_category
FROM
    agg a
WHERE
    a.total_orders > 5
ORDER BY
    a.total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
    COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY SUM(l.l_extendedprice) DESC) AS rank_by_revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
WHERE 
    p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 20
    AND r.r_name LIKE 'Asia%'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_comment, p.p_type
HAVING 
    COUNT(l.l_orderkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    rank_by_revenue, total_orders DESC;
sql2:
WITH asian_partsupp AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name LIKE 'Asia%'
),
part_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
        p.p_type,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price,
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS sum_price
    FROM 
        part p
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    JOIN 
        asian_partsupp aps ON p.p_partkey = aps.ps_partkey
    WHERE 
        p.p_size BETWEEN 10 AND 20
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_comment, p.p_type
)
SELECT 
    p_partkey,
    p_name,
    short_comment,
    total_orders,
    total_quantity,
    avg_price,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p_type ORDER BY sum_price DESC) AS rank_by_revenue
FROM part_agg
WHERE total_orders > 5
ORDER BY rank_by_revenue, total_orders DESC;

sql1:
WITH StringMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_name FROM 1 FOR 3) AS name_prefix,
        REPLACE(p.p_comment, ' ', '') AS compact_comment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_name) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available
    FROM 
        part p
    LEFT JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    LEFT JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_comment
),
OrderedMetrics AS (
    SELECT 
        sm.p_partkey,
        sm.p_name,
        sm.name_length,
        sm.name_prefix,
        sm.compact_comment,
        sm.supplier_count,
        sm.total_available,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sm.supplier_count DESC, sm.total_available DESC) AS rank
    FROM 
        StringMetrics sm
)
SELECT 
    om.p_partkey,
    om.p_name,
    om.name_length,
    om.name_prefix,
    om.compact_comment,
    om.supplier_count,
    om.total_available,
    CONCAT('Rank: ', om.rank) AS rank_string
FROM 
    OrderedMetrics om
WHERE 
    om.supplier_count > 0
ORDER BY 
    om.rank;
sql2:
SELECT 
    sub.p_partkey,
    sub.p_name,
    sub.name_length,
    sub.name_prefix,
    sub.compact_comment,
    sub.supplier_count,
    sub.total_available,
    CONCAT('Rank: ', ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sub.supplier_count DESC, sub.total_available DESC)) AS rank_string
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        LENGTH(p.p_name) AS name_length,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_name FROM 1 FOR 3) AS name_prefix,
        REPLACE(p.p_comment, ' ', '') AS compact_comment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_name) AS supplier_count,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available
    FROM 
        part p
    INNER JOIN 
        partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN 
        supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    GROUP BY 
        p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_comment
    HAVING 
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.s_name) > 0
) sub
ORDER BY 
    supplier_count DESC, total_available DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    o.o_orderkey AS order_key,
    o.o_orderdate AS order_date,
    CONCAT('Part: ', p.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', c.c_name, ', Order: ', o.o_orderkey) AS order_summary,
    CASE 
        WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Fully Filled'
        WHEN o.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 'Partially Filled'
        ELSE 'Unknown Status'
    END AS order_status_description
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    p.p_name LIKE '%widget%'
    AND c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
ORDER BY 
    order_date DESC
LIMIT 100;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE '%widget%'
),
building_customers AS (
    SELECT c_custkey, c_name
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
),
order_info AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey, o.o_orderdate, o.o_orderstatus, bc.c_name
    FROM orders o
    INNER JOIN building_customers bc ON o.o_custkey = bc.c_custkey
)
SELECT 
    fp.p_name AS part_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    oi.c_name AS customer_name,
    oi.o_orderkey AS order_key,
    oi.o_orderdate AS order_date,
    CONCAT('Part: ', fp.p_name, ', Supplier: ', s.s_name, ', Customer: ', oi.c_name, ', Order: ', oi.o_orderkey) AS order_summary,
    CASE 
        WHEN oi.o_orderstatus = 'F' THEN 'Fully Filled'
        WHEN oi.o_orderstatus = 'P' THEN 'Partially Filled'
        ELSE 'Unknown Status'
    END AS order_status_description
FROM 
    filtered_parts fp
INNER JOIN lineitem l ON fp.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
INNER JOIN order_info oi ON l.l_orderkey = oi.o_orderkey
INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
ORDER BY 
    order_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

sql1:
WITH processed_parts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey, 
        UPPER(p.p_name) AS upper_name, 
        LOWER(p.p_comment) AS lower_comment, 
        TRIM(p.p_container) AS trimmed_container, 
        REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'old', 'new') AS replaced_comment
    FROM 
        part p
),
supplier_info AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey, 
        CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS supplier_details, 
        LENGTH(s.s_comment) AS comment_length
    FROM 
        supplier s
),
order_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        o.o_orderkey, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS total_items
    FROM 
        orders o
    JOIN 
        lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    GROUP BY 
        o.o_orderkey
)
SELECT 
    pp.upper_name, 
    si.supplier_details, 
    os.total_revenue, 
    os.total_items, 
    pp.replaced_comment
FROM 
    processed_parts pp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON pp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier_info si ON ps.ps_suppkey = si.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    order_summary os ON os.o_orderkey = ps.ps_partkey
WHERE 
    pp.trimmed_container LIKE 'BOX%'
ORDER BY 
    os.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
SELECT 
    UPPER(p.p_name) AS upper_name, 
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' - ', s.s_address) AS supplier_details, 
    os.total_revenue, 
    os.total_items, 
    REPLACE(p.p_comment, 'old', 'new') AS replaced_comment
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    (SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey AS o_orderkey, 
        SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue,
        COUNT(l.l_orderkey) AS total_items
    FROM 
        lineitem l
    WHERE 
        EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
    GROUP BY 
        l.l_orderkey) os ON os.o_orderkey = ps.ps_partkey
WHERE 
    TRIM(p.p_container) LIKE 'BOX%'
ORDER BY 
    os.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_balance, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN l.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN l.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS max_returned_price,
    SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' (', s.s_phone, ')') AS supplier_info
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE p.p_size > 10 
AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31' 
AND c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    s.s_phone, 
    p.p_comment
HAVING SUM(l.l_quantity) > 1000
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o.o_orderkey
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
    WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING'
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_orderkey, l.l_partkey, l.l_suppkey, l.l_quantity, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_returnflag
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        SUM(fl.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        AVG(s.s_acctbal) AS avg_supplier_balance,
        COUNT(DISTINCT fo.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
        MAX(CASE WHEN fl.l_returnflag = 'R' THEN fl.l_extendedprice ELSE 0 END) AS max_returned_price,
        SUBSTRING(p.p_comment, 1, 10) AS short_comment,
        CONCAT(s.s_name, ' (', s.s_phone, ')') AS supplier_info
    FROM part p
    JOIN filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN filtered_orders fo ON fl.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    WHERE p.p_size > 10
    GROUP BY
        p.p_name,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_phone,
        p.p_comment
)
SELECT p_name, total_quantity, avg_supplier_balance, total_orders, max_returned_price, short_comment, supplier_info
FROM base
WHERE total_quantity > 1000
ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
),
SupplierDetails AS (
    SELECT r.r_name, n.n_name, rs.s_name, rs.rank, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM RankedSuppliers rs
    JOIN nation n ON rs.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    JOIN partsupp ps ON rs.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    WHERE rs.rank <= 5
    GROUP BY r.r_name, n.n_name, rs.s_name, rs.rank
)
SELECT r_name, n_name, s_name, rank, total_supply_cost,
       CONCAT(s_name, ' from ', n_name, ' in ', r_name, ' provides a total supply cost of $', 
              CAST(total_supply_cost AS DECIMAL(10, 2))) AS description
FROM SupplierDetails
ORDER BY r_name, n_name, rank;
sql2:
SELECT t.r_name, t.n_name, t.s_name, t.rank, t.total_supply_cost,
       CONCAT(t.s_name, ' from ', t.n_name, ' in ', t.r_name, ' provides a total supply cost of $',
              CAST(t.total_supply_cost AS DECIMAL(10, 2))) AS description
FROM (
    SELECT r.r_name, n.n_name, s.s_name,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_nationkey ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) DESC) AS rank,
           SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY r.r_name, n.n_name, s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, s.s_nationkey
) t
WHERE t.rank <= 5
ORDER BY t.r_name, t.n_name, t.rank;

sql1:
SELECT 
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS avg_price_after_discount,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    r.r_name LIKE 'Asia%' 
    AND l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
    AND s.s_comment LIKE '%quality%'
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, p.p_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY 
    total_available_quantity DESC, avg_price_after_discount ASC;
sql2:
WITH asian_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE r.r_name LIKE 'Asia%'
      AND s.s_comment LIKE '%quality%'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_orderkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS net_price
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'
)
SELECT
    asup.s_name AS supplier_name,
    p.p_name AS part_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    AVG(fl.net_price) AS avg_price_after_discount,
    r.r_name AS region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fl.l_orderkey) AS total_orders
FROM
    asian_suppliers asup
JOIN partsupp ps ON ps.ps_suppkey = asup.s_suppkey
JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON fl.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN orders o ON o.o_orderkey = fl.l_orderkey
JOIN supplier s2 ON s2.s_suppkey = asup.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s2.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
GROUP BY
    asup.s_name, p.p_name, r.r_name
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC, avg_price_after_discount ASC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    p.p_mfgr,
    p.p_brand,
    p.p_type,
    p.p_size,
    p.p_container,
    p.p_retailprice,
    p.p_comment,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    c.c_name AS customer_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    LENGTH(p.p_comment) AS comment_length,
    CONCAT('Processed: ', p.p_name, ' (', p.p_brand, ')') AS processed_info
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
WHERE 
    p.p_retailprice > 100.00 
    AND s.s_acctbal > 500.00
    AND o.o_orderdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, p.p_mfgr, p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size, 
    p.p_container, p.p_retailprice, p.p_comment, s.s_name, c.c_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC, avg_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 50;
sql2:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey, p_name, p_mfgr, p_brand, p_type, p_size, p_container, p_retailprice, p_comment
    FROM part
    WHERE p_retailprice > 100.00
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 500.00
),
filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
),
base_data AS (
    SELECT
        fp.p_partkey,
        fp.p_name,
        fp.p_mfgr,
        fp.p_brand,
        fp.p_type,
        fp.p_size,
        fp.p_container,
        fp.p_retailprice,
        fp.p_comment,
        fs.s_name,
        c.c_name,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        fo.o_orderkey
    FROM filtered_parts fp
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON fp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON ps.ps_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON fp.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer c ON fo.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
)
SELECT
    p_partkey,
    p_name,
    p_mfgr,
    p_brand,
    p_type,
    p_size,
    p_container,
    p_retailprice,
    p_comment,
    s_name AS supplier_name,
    c_name AS customer_name,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_extended_price,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o_orderkey) AS total_orders,
    LENGTH(p_comment) AS comment_length,
    CONCAT('Processed: ', p_name, ' (', p_brand, ')') AS processed_info
FROM base_data
GROUP BY
    p_partkey, p_name, p_mfgr, p_brand, p_type, p_size,
    p_container, p_retailprice, p_comment, s_name, c_name
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC, avg_extended_price DESC
LIMIT 50;

sql1:
SELECT 
    CONCAT(s.s_name, ' from ', n.n_name, ', located in ', r.r_name) AS supplier_info,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) AS unique_parts,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
FROM 
    supplier s
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
WHERE 
    p.p_brand LIKE '%BRAND%'
    AND p.p_comment NOT LIKE '%defective%'
    AND r.r_name IN ('EUROPE', 'ASIA')
GROUP BY 
    s.s_name, n.n_name, r.r_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.p_partkey) > 5
ORDER BY 
    total_supply_cost DESC, unique_parts ASC;
sql2:
WITH supplier_parts AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_name,
        n.n_name,
        r.r_name,
        ps.ps_availqty,
        ps.ps_supplycost,
        p.p_partkey
    FROM
        supplier s,
        nation n,
        region r,
        partsupp ps,
        part p
    WHERE
        s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
        AND n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
        AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        AND ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        AND p.p_brand LIKE '%BRAND%'
        AND p.p_comment NOT LIKE '%defective%'
        AND (r.r_name = 'EUROPE' OR r.r_name = 'ASIA')
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(s_name, ' from ', n_name, ', located in ', r_name) AS supplier_info,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p_partkey) AS unique_parts,
        SUM(ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity,
        SUM(ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM
        supplier_parts
    GROUP BY
        s_name, n_name, r_name
)
SELECT
    supplier_info,
    unique_parts,
    total_available_quantity,
    total_supply_cost
FROM
    aggregated
WHERE
    unique_parts > 5
ORDER BY
    total_supply_cost DESC, unique_parts ASC;

sql1:
WITH RankedParts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_partkey,
        p.p_name,
        p.p_brand,
        p.p_type,
        p.p_retailprice,
        p.p_comment,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) as brand_rank
    FROM 
        part p
    WHERE 
        LOWER(p.p_comment) LIKE '%quality%' 
        OR LOWER(p.p_comment) LIKE '%premium%'
),
SupplierInfo AS (
    SELECT 
        s.s_suppkey,
        s.s_name,
        s.s_phone,
        SUBSTRING(s.s_address, 1, 20) AS short_address,
        r.r_name AS region_name
    FROM 
        supplier s
    JOIN 
        nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    JOIN 
        region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE 
        s.s_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(s2.s_acctbal) FROM supplier s2)
    ORDER BY 
        s.s_acctbal DESC
)
SELECT 
    rp.p_partkey,
    rp.p_name,
    rp.p_brand,
    rp.p_type,
    rp.p_retailprice,
    si.s_name AS supplier_name,
    si.short_address,
    si.s_phone,
    si.region_name
FROM 
    RankedParts rp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON rp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    SupplierInfo si ON ps.ps_suppkey = si.s_suppkey
WHERE 
    rp.brand_rank <= 5
ORDER BY 
    rp.p_retailprice DESC, si.s_name;
sql2:
SELECT 
    rp.p_partkey,
    rp.p_name,
    rp.p_brand,
    rp.p_type,
    rp.p_retailprice,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    SUBSTRING(s.s_address, 1, 20) AS short_address,
    s.s_phone,
    r.r_name AS region_name
FROM 
    (
        SELECT 
            p.p_partkey,
            p.p_name,
            p.p_brand,
            p.p_type,
            p.p_retailprice,
            p.p_comment,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_brand ORDER BY p.p_retailprice DESC) as brand_rank
        FROM 
            part p
        WHERE 
            LOWER(p.p_comment) LIKE '%quality%' 
            OR LOWER(p.p_comment) LIKE '%premium%'
    ) rp
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON rp.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN 
    region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
CROSS JOIN 
    (SELECT AVG(s2.s_acctbal) AS avg_acctbal FROM supplier s2) avg_s
WHERE 
    rp.brand_rank <= 5
    AND s.s_acctbal > avg_s.avg_acctbal
ORDER BY 
    rp.p_retailprice DESC, s.s_name;

sql1:
WITH RankedSuppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, p.p_type
), FilteredSuppliers AS (
    SELECT r.r_name AS region, ns.n_name AS nation, rs.s_name, rs.total_cost
    FROM RankedSuppliers rs
    JOIN supplier s ON rs.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation ns ON s.s_nationkey = ns.n_nationkey
    JOIN region r ON ns.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    WHERE rs.rank <= 3
)
SELECT fs.region, fs.nation, fs.s_name, fs.total_cost
FROM FilteredSuppliers fs
ORDER BY fs.region, fs.nation, fs.total_cost DESC;
sql2:
SELECT r.r_name AS region,
       n.n_name AS nation,
       s.s_name,
       sub.total_cost
FROM (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, total_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, p.p_type,
               SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.p_type ORDER BY SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) DESC) AS rank
        FROM supplier s
        JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
        JOIN part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
        GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, p.p_type
    ) ranked
    WHERE rank <= 3
) sub
JOIN supplier s ON sub.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
ORDER BY r.r_name, n.n_name, sub.total_cost DESC;
